name: John Hickenlooper
subject: Whatever happens
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Hickenlooper for Colorado
body:
|
#
Folks -- This is a really important month for us. Here's why: In a couple of weeks, our fundraising numbers are going to become public when we file our very first full quarterly report with the FEC. Whatever we report -- both in terms of money raised and number of individual donors -- will send a message about our campaign. **Our report will be picked apart by everyone, from the pundits to Washington Republican operatives desperately searching for any sign of weakness as they try to tear us down.** But if our FEC report demonstrates the strength and energy of this grassroots campaign we're building, then we'll start 2020 with the momentum we need to win this election come November. [**This is a big test for our campaign, and we 're doing it without taking any money from corporate PACs. Can I count on you to add a contribution of $10 (or more!) to our campaign before the FEC deadline at the end of this month?**](https://secure.hickenlooper.?g=Wvb-QcQot1BcsCb456pUfvA "https://secure.actblue.com/donate/jwh-em-191220-eoy?refcode=em-191220-eoy2-full&amounts=5,10,25,50,100,150,250&firstname=&lastname=&email=dpwillis67@gmail.com&addr1=&city=Cresco&state=PA&zip=18326&phone=&employer=&occupation=") [](https://secure.hickenlooper.?g=Wvb-QcQot1BcsCb456pUfvA "https://secure.actblue.com/donate/jwh-em-191220-eoy?refcode=em-191220-eoy2-full&amounts=5,10,25,50,100,150,250&firstname=&lastname=&email=dpwillis67@gmail.com&addr1=&city=Cresco&state=PA&zip=18326&phone=&employer=&occupation=") There is something special happening in our campaign. We're putting together a powerful movement of people, and we're doing it the right way: lifting folks up instead of tearing them down, talking about the issues, and refusing money from the corporate PACs polluting our politics. I'm glad you're a part of it, and I really hope I can count on you to step up and make a donation before the deadline. All my best, -- John | [DONATE TODAY](https://secure.hickenlooper.?g=Wvb-QcQot1BcsCb456pUfvA "https://secure.actblue.com/donate/jwh-em-191220-eoy?refcode=em-191220-eoy2-full&amounts=5,10,25,50,100,150,250&firstname=&lastname=&email=dpwillis67@gmail.com&addr1=&city=Cresco&state=PA&zip=18326&phone=&employer=&occupation=")
---

---

subject: Getting close
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Bennet for America
body:

| Team, we are getting SO CLOSE:

FIRST: Michael announced that if our campaign doesn't raise $700,000 by January 16th, we won't have the ability to be competitive in this race.

THEN: Since the announcement, thousands of grassroots donors from around the country stepped up and chipped in!

[NOW: We are SO CLOSE to hitting the first $100,000 of our $700,000 goal -- so we need you to chip in right now!](https://secure.michaelbennet.com/page/m/35cba8c4/134673f2/95be91f/69979940/2945863713/VEsH/?g=GUSlGlH8x8Vcy9-bgCeB4mA "https://secure.actblue.com/donate/nhinvestment?refcode=EM_FR_B3_122019_AC_ND&recurring=auto&amount=1&amounts=10,29,50,100,250,500,1000")

name: Team Yang
subject: Finally
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Friends of Andrew Yang
body:
They’re starting to notice

| [](http://act.yang2020.com/go/68?t=1&akid=4998%2E377263%2EWt0Ifu) Yang Gang --

Despite being one of only six candidates to qualify and participate in each and every debate to this point, Andrew’s gotten by far the least amount of speaking time, and even less attention from the press.

But that all changed last night. Andrew’s ideas were fully on display for the American people, and boy did he deliver. And the press noticed: _USA TODAY_ was one of several publications that called him a winner of last night’s debate.

**But just this morning, the DNC raised the debate thresholds to the highest yet. 5% in four polls, or 7% in two early state polls. And we only have until January 10th to qualify.

[We have to make sure we have the resources to put Andrew on the debate stage in January. Can you chip in $10 or more right now and help us keep our momentum from last night and qualify for January’s debate?](https://act.yang2020.com/go/20215?t=5&akid=4998%2E377263%2EWt0Ifu)** _If you've saved payment information with ActBlue Express, your donation will go through immediately:_ | | [$10 »](https://act.yang2020.com/go/20215?t=6&express_lane=true&amount=10&akid=4998%2E377263%2EWt0Ifu)
---
| | [$25 »](https://act.yang2020.com/go/20215?t=7&express_lane=true&amount=25&akid=4998%2E377263%2EWt0Ifu)
---
| [$50 »](https://act.yang2020.com/go/20215?t=8&express_lane=true&amount=50&akid=4998%2E377263%2EWt0Ifu)
---
| | [$100»](https://act.yang2020.com/go/20215?t=9&express_lane=true&amount=100&akid=4998%2E377263%2EWt0Ifu)
---
| [$250 »](https://act.yang2020.com/go/20215?t=10&express_lane=true&amount=250&akid=4998%2E377263%2EWt0Ifu)
---
| | [OTHER »](https://act.yang2020.com/go/20215?t=11&amount=25&akid=4998%2E377263%2EWt0Ifu)
---
After almost an entire year’s worth of polling at the top, with a clear vision and hundreds of thousands of donors, dozens of offices in the early states, million-dollar ad buys, and the most intense, growing support, we were wondering if the press would ever notice. **Now they have.

[We can’t afford to let up and not make the January stage now that we have the momentum. Chip in now.](https://act.yang2020.com/go/20215?t=12&akid=4998%2E377263%2EWt0Ifu)**

Thank you for everything,

Team Yang
**We don't have corporate PACs or big donors who can close the fundraising gap we face, just grassroots donors like you powering this campaign. Please give now.** | [Contribute](https://act.yang2020.com/go/20215?t=13&akid=4998%2E377263%2EWt0Ifu)
---

This email was sent to dpwillis67@gmail.com. We're proud you're part of the Yang Gang! But if you want to receive less email from us, you can do that [here.](https://act.yang2020.com/signup/email-actionkit-feweremails-20190821/?t=2&akid=4998%2E377263%2EWt0Ifu) And if you absolutely don't want to hear from us again you can [unsubscribe here.](https://act.yang2020.com/unsubscribe/unsubscribe?t=3&akid=4998%2E377263%2EWt0Ifu) Contributions or gifts to Friends of Andrew Yang are not tax deductible. | Paid for by Friends of Andrew Yang
---

name: Cory Booker
subject: I have every intention of being back on the debate stage next month.
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Cory 2020
body:
| | |
---
| The DNC's debate thresholds for January were just announced this morning. Team, In case you haven't seen the news yet, the DNC's thresholds for the January debate were just announced this morning. I have every intention of being back on the debate stage next month. The only thing that stands in our way is the polling threshold. **Will you chip in right now to help fund more TV ads so we can reach more voters? Here 's a link, team: [https://secure.actblue.com/donate/cory2020-em-december](https://act.corybooker.%3D/?g=IiwAaFH8x8VcsCn-MvZWseA "https://secure.actblue.com/donate/cory2020-em-december?refcode=em_fr_20191220_CB_20191220-fr-CB-EM3-actives_actives_l1&email=dpwillis67@gmail.com&firstname=&lastname=&city=Cresco&state=PA&zip=18326&phone=&occupation=&employer=")** Let's keep pushing forward. Thankful for your support,
Cory _\---FORWARDED MESSAGE---_
Hey there, did you see the breaking news? Moments ago, the DNC released the new debate thresholds for January, and now more than ever, it's critical that we hit our $800,000 end-of-quarter goal to keep our ads running. **[Chip in right now to help us do it.](https://act.corybooker.%3D/?g=IiwAaFH8x8VcsCn-MvZWseA "https://secure.actblue.com/donate/cory2020-em-december?refcode=em_fr_20191220_CB_20191220-fr-CB-EM3-actives_actives_l2&email=dpwillis67@gmail.com&firstname=&lastname=&city=Cresco&state=PA&zip=18326&phone=&occupation=&employer=")** This is going to be a difficult threshold to meet, but here's what we know... **EARLIER THIS MONTH:** Supporters like you chipped in to help us get our first TV ad on the air. **DURING LAST NIGHT 'S DEBATE:** Americans across the country saw the ad run live during the debate featuring Joe Biden, Pete Buttigieg, Amy Klobuchar, Bernie Sanders, Tom Steyer, Elizabeth Warren, and Andrew Yang. **LATER THAT NIGHT:** On CNN, a focus group of Iowa caucus-goers said that they will be caucusing for Cory on February 3rd, even though he wasn't on the debate stage. It's clear that these ads are working, but we need to expand our ad budget to keep them on the air. **Will you donate today to help us stay on TV?** If you've saved your payment information with ActBlue Express, your donation will go through immediately: | | | [](https://act.corybooker.%3D/?g=IiwAaFH8x8VcsCn-MvZWseA "https://secure.actblue.com/donate/cory2020-em-december?refcode=em_fr_20191220_CB_20191220-fr-CB-EM3-actives_actives_express5&amount=5&express_lane=true&email=dpwillis67@gmail.com&firstname=&lastname=&city=Cresco&state=PA&zip=18326&phone=&occupation=&employer=&amounts=5,10,22,50,100")

This campaign is moving quickly. If you want the most up-to-date information, follow Cory on [Instagram](https://act.corybooker.com/page/m/4fdc0cc4/5fca0d19/7b80d013/291ce7e4/1150919464/VEsHBA/?g=IiwAaFH8x8VcsCn-MvZWseA "https://www.instagram.com/corybooker/"), [Twitter](https://act.corybooker.com/page/m/4fdc0cc4/5fca0d19/7b80d013/291ce7e3/1150919464/VEsHBw/?g=IiwAaFH8x8VcsCn-MvZWseA "https://twitter.com/corybooker"), and [Facebook](https://act.corybooker.com/page/m/4fdc0cc4/5fca0d19/7b80d013/291ce7e2/1150919464/VEsHBg/?g=IiwAaFH8x8VcsCn-MvZWseA "https://www.facebook.com/corybooker").
It's time for leadership that can reignite our spirit of common purpose. That takes all of us. We believe these emails are an important way to stay in touch, but if at any point you'd like to stop getting these updates, you can unsubscribe [here](https://act.corybooker.com/page/m/4fdc0cc4/5fca0d19/7b80d013/291ce7e1/1150919464/VEsHAQ/?g=IiwAaFH8x8VcsCn-MvZWseA "https://act.corybooker.com/unsubscribe").
Is this not your preferred email address? You can update your contact info [here](https://act.corybooker.com/page/m/4fdc0cc4/5fca0d19/7b80d013/291ce7e5/1150919464/VEsHAA/?g=IiwAaFH8x8VcsCn-MvZWseA "https://corybooker.com/join?source=em_emfooter").

Moments ago, the DNC released the new debate thresholds for January, and now more than ever, it's critical that we hit our $800,000 end-of-quarter goal to keep our ads running. "=" This is going to be a difficult threshold to meet, but here's what we know... EARLIER THIS MONTH: Supporters like you chipped in to help us get our first TV ad on the air. DURING LAST NIGHT 'S DEBATE: Americans across the country saw the ad run live during the debate featuring Joe Biden, Pete Buttigieg, Amy Klobuchar, Bernie Sanders, Tom Steyer, Elizabeth Warren, and Andrew Yang. LATER THAT NIGHT: On CNN, a focus group of Iowa caucus-goers said that they will be caucusing for Cory on February 3rd, even though he wasn't on the debate stage. It's clear that these ads are working, but we need to expand our ad budget to keep them on the air. Will you donate today to help us stay on TV? **There’s a difference, friend.** There’s a difference between merely voting to pass legislation and literally making real progress happen. And when it comes to the climate crisis, it is the difference between prospering and perishing. [_**Join Tom to fight for a real difference on the climate crisis — donate today to show your support.**_](http://clicks.tomsteyer.com/wf/click?upn=cBSXlkRq21E9V5onLqLCBp8P9ONZnN8l-2Ffw22HZRSC1mFfjCO0JskafmRGtoRfu5q63k6QsLsQ-2BxQlKGJ2aOCV8sjib1a2vgIBxFYdrfoIIezPFFJGKamB0gsgDOpGDru3s-2FruCo1wHKIb51H5uZas431yKaurV7Rj2J8TuwQzZMJlT-2BYv40wCCCxq145xLHWmXdccvusNJtqO-2FD4R2QrKg7XMfAudEflEzP-2FmQIA1f2LCQr76HvUwhiill9yYje_enNSH-2FxHAAqXgxiHRFihpX91d75ERAkpfg4XQfmYhCFCgEVvHZJIBnVwrwztgYJz4eFq9BMkyZwT1fV8gU3hTKgydBXEIdOTn-2BDH-2Bd74DFcWlJZVazTXrmMW1f7nDo6KNkkMDf2-2FlacIO-2FOlve5veiFuDWIFmsqIyrZKJeEm-2FjXmqPi-2BmmriPe5q4zdfb47QrShz3WCPJUxd9zhQ9mWzGiTLYD1T8zeq-2BIPjsH7W21NFAGSNfDcVQXzgfmbmi0Z7YSjWSHiMOJlOKoIpsbUCYG0oCQcnatvUQ4iBl2GDE4C1DCaSUSM2qMIeGpXiW7MWxOwP1FbA43858dehxF6Cz8QyBEkosWmFC79N9yZ-2BHo0hIhQE3NONIzqtgnCxSzEAWMReT5gPwXAi1IYirlzDTr20HNs2PPZmfrvL-2BuI7ijpPVzW4z1S-2F8QUJjiICCgTsmXXxPI1EO7Blr01m4LZRGmV28Kr1k9WuogpzN-2FK7ztk-3D)

"**I'm the only one on this stage who said climate is my number-one priority.** It's a crisis we have to deal with, but it's also our greatest opportunity to create millions of good-paying union jobs across the country and clean up the air and water in the black and brown communities where it's so essential." - Tom
---
While his peers spent years signing their name to bills that ended up in a basement, Tom was knocking on doors to get voters to hold Big Oil accountable. While other candidates put out plans to move the needle on climate, Tom worked with climate experts to build a policy with proper funding and realistic steps to keep America on a climate-smart path. The other candidates want to continue using a broken system that has failed to pass meaningful climate action for 20 years, but Tom knows we need a different approach. He will declare the climate crisis a national emergency one day one as president and make it the top priority of his administration — **if it isn’t number one, it just won’t get done.** That’s the difference with Tom. [_**He's the only candidate who is acting like our house is on fire. The DNC has released new requirements for the January debate, and we need your help to get there — donate today to make sure he stays on the debate stage.**_](http://clicks.tomsteyer.com/wf/click?upn=cBSXlkRq21E9V5onLqLCBp8P9ONZnN8l-2Ffw22HZRSC1mFfjCO0JskafmRGtoRfu5q63k6QsLsQ-2BxQlKGJ2aOCV8sjib1a2vgIBxFYdrfoIIezPFFJGKamB0gsgDOpGDru3s-2FruCo1wHKIb51H5uZas431yKaurV7Rj2J8TuwQzZMJlT-2BYv40wCCCxq145xLHWmXdccvusNJtqO-2FD4R2QrKg7XMfAudEflEzP-2FmQIA1f2LCQr76HvUwhiill9yYje_enNSH-2FxHAAqXgxiHRFihpX91d75ERAkpfg4XQfmYhCFCgEVvHZJIBnVwrwztgYJz4eFq9BMkyZwT1fV8gU3hTKgydBXEIdOTn-2BDH-2Bd74DFcWlJZVazTXrmMW1f7nDo6KNkkMDf2-2FlacIO-2FOlve5veiFuDWIFmsqIyrZKJeEm-2FjXmqPi-2BmmriPe5q4zdfb47QrShz3WCPJUxd9zhQ9mWzGiTLYD1T8zeq-2BIPjsH7W21NFAGSNfDcVQXzgfmbmi0Z70mE0-2FvJ65ZkMrqPRSMza-2BZuXpLt95-2BqZsPTS8Mf0P12qyEB-2B2wmxotU5B4B0jgsbooXc9KFT-2BfL2yoS4wlsVC0J34MnOUkjhBW7RLnZQRauQOzzf6EivMPPAMYkNaadzBR-2BoJIHqjEce0DKXIEnVHc2zL1Vp2OuiJYHiTs0kATq8VdIVN3XUwyPywNDkiUWeVExwhD5HQw5gpMMwarBdW4lQimNpcX72RgeNyIKvCHk-3D) Time to fight for climate,

clean_body: | | | | There’s a difference, friend. There’s a difference between merely voting to pass legislation and literally making real progress happen. And when it comes to the climate crisis, it is the difference between prospering and perishing. "I'm the only one on this stage who said climate is my number-one priority. It's a crisis we have to deal with, but it's also our greatest opportunity to create millions of good-paying union jobs across the country and clean up the air and water in the black and brown communities where it's so essential." - Tom While his peers spent years signing their name to bills that ended up in a basement, Tom was knocking on doors to get voters to hold Big Oil accountable. While other candidates put out plans to move the needle on climate, Tom worked with climate experts to build a policy with proper funding and realistic steps to keep America on a climate-smart path. The other candidates want to continue using a broken system that has failed to pass meaningful climate action for 20 years, but Tom knows we need a different approach. He will declare the climate crisis a national emergency one day one as president and make it the top priority of his administration — if it isn’t number one, it just won’t get done. That’s the difference with Tom. "My experience building a business, understanding how to make that happen, means **I can go toe-to-toe with Mr. Trump, and take him down on the economy, and expose him as a fraud and a failure.** And I think that's different from the other people on this stage. I think we need a different, unconventional way of attacking a different, unconventional president." -Tom

Trump’s going to try to spin himself as the man with an economic plan — but high employment isn’t worth bragging about if those jobs don’t pay enough for people to live on. The other candidates just don’t have any experience building or running a successful business like Tom has. He created a multi-billion dollar international business from the ground up and knows just how to beat Trump on the economy. Tom has a thorough plan to put people over profits, create millions of good-paying union jobs, and transition us into a renewable economy. clean_body: | | | | What Tom said during the debate last night | Here’s the brutal truth, friend: None of the other candidates running for the Democratic nomination can come at Donald Trump where it’ll hurt him most — the economy. "My experience building a business, understanding how to make that happen, means I can go toe-to-toe with Mr. Trump, and take him down on the economy, and expose him as a fraud and a failure. And I think that's different from the other people on this stage. I think we need a different, unconventional way of attacking a different, unconventional president." -Tom Trump’s going to try to spin himself as the man with an economic plan — but high employment isn’t worth bragging about if those jobs don’t pay enough for people to live on. The other candidates just don’t have any experience building or running a successful business like Tom has. He created a multi-billion dollar international business from the ground up and knows just how to beat Trump on the economy. Tom has a thorough plan to put people over profits, create millions of good-paying union jobs, and transition us into a renewable economy. name: Jay Inslee
subject: For the first time since the presidential contest began...
disclaimer_text: PAID FOR BY JAY INSLEE FOR WASHINGTON (D)
body:
Did you get a chance to watch last night's debate?
| [](https://act.jayinslee.com/go/8403?t=3&akid=8016%2E868730%2Eq03LG_) Friend, Last night, Democratic presidential candidates held a debate in L.A., barely 70 miles from where the Ventura Fire ravaged thousands of acres of Southern California. And for the first time since the presidential contest began, debate moderators directed climate questions at the candidates within the first hour. Good. **Finally.** The media, the party, and the candidates are _starting_ to see the power of our movement demanding climate action. And yet this _must_ be the start of something a lot bigger. Confronting the climate crisis is a challenge greater than anything the American people have faced in generations. We can -- we must -- rise to meet this challenge. But to do it, we need national leaders committed to a transformative agenda for climate action. This week in Washington state, we announced a bold agenda for 2020 that includes five pieces of climate legislation that I am calling on our legislature to take up as soon as session begins. States like Washington across the country are taking action. But we're being left behind by folks in D.C. -- especially in the Senate -- more interested in excusing the corruption of Donald Trump than in taking action on behalf of the American people and the world. So last night's debate was a start. But it was just a start. We need the climate crisis to be our top priority. [**If you agree, head over to Facebook and join me in sending a clear message demanding every candidate prioritize climate action, because -- you know what? -- we must defeat the climate crisis.**](https://act.jayinslee.com/go/8403?t=4&akid=8016%2E868730%2Eq03LG_) Very truly yours, Jay Inslee | [SHARE!](https://act.jayinslee.com/go/8403?t=5&akid=8016%2E868730%2Eq03LG_)
---
This email was sent to dpwillis67@gmail.com. [Click here to unsubscribe](http://act.jayinslee.com/cms/unsubscribe/unsubscribe/?t=6&akid=8016%2E868730%2Eq03LG_). Contributions or gifts to JAY INSLEE FOR WASHINGTON (D) are not tax deductible. | PAID FOR BY JAY INSLEE FOR WASHINGTON (D)
PO BOX 21067 SEATTLE, WA 98111

| | | Joe Cunningham Officially Voting For Impeachment Dear Friend, Hate to say it... but I was a bit surprised. I always suspected Joe Cunningham’s so-called “independence” was for show, _but it became clear this week_. **Joe Cunningham handed his voting card over to Nancy Pelosi and National Democrats and voted to impeach the President.** _We both know that no matter your opinion of the President, the impeachment was a 100% partisan effort that distracts from real and serious issues we should be dealing with_. I wrote all about it in _The Post and Courier_ this week. If you like, you can read the entire op ed here: [_**Nancy Mace: Joe Cunningham Chooses Democratic Party Over Lowcountry**_](https://nancymaceforcongress.cmail20.com/t/r-l-jhlyuhdy-uuffjdtr-d/) Now that Joe has exposed himself as partisan entirely and constantly beholden to Nancy Pelosi, _you and I have to focus on putting a serious, common sense fiscal conservative in office as our next member of Congress_. I believe I am that person, and I’m asking for your help today. _I’m going to have my work cut out for me - the Left has raised Joe millions to help him hide from his record_. But I don’t plan to let him. That means we’ll need _**YOUR**_ help to compete with the funds to do so.

name: Tina Smith
subject: I owe you an explanation
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Tina Smith for Minnesota
body:
I am about to ask you to contribute to my campaign for U.S. Senate as part of our end-of-year fundraising push. Will you let me explain?

| [](https://action.tinaforminnesota.%3D/?g=YCjTcDpTVzRarKyUt8_RZpA "https://secure.actblue.com/donate/tsm-em191220-eoq3?refcode=em191220-eoq3&recurring=yes&email=dpwillis67@gmail.com&zip=18326&firstname=&lastname=&addr1=&addr2=&city=Cresco&state=PA&phone=&employer=&occupation=&amount=10") Friend --

In just a moment, I am going to ask you to contribute to my campaign for U.S. Senate as part of our end-of-year fundraising push. My hope is that you will give me a moment to explain why this request is so important.

For too long, Mitch McConnell has turned the Senate into a place where good ideas go to die -- by blocking just about every common-sense bill that crosses his desk. Last time I checked, there are nearly 400 bills passed by House Democrats just piling up and collecting dust.

The truth is, McConnell doesn't work for folks like you and me. He works for those who cut him hefty checks and fill his campaign coffers with special interest cash. We deserve better than this sort of pay-to-play politics.

Next year, we have a unique opportunity to deliver the change millions of Americans have been waiting for. Democrats only need to flip four seats to take back the Senate, but holding strong in Minnesota is the key to victory.

**Chip in $10 or more toward our end-of-year goal to help us save Minnesota's Senate seat and put Democrats on a path to win the majority. Your contribution before the deadline would give our campaign the resources we need in the new year.** _If you've saved payment information with ActBlue Express, your donation will go through immediately:_ | | [$10 »](https://action.tinaforminnesota.%3D/?g=YCjTcDpTVzRarKyUt8_RZpA "https://secure.actblue.com/donate/tsm-em191220-eoq3?refcode=em191220-eoq3&recurring=yes&email=dpwillis67@gmail.com&zip=18326&firstname=&lastname=&addr1=&addr2=&city=Cresco&state=PA&phone=&employer=&occupation=&express_lane=true&amount=10")

clean_body: I am about to ask you to contribute to my campaign for U.S. Senate as part of our end-of-year fundraising push. Will you let me explain? | "" Friend -- In just a moment, I am going to ask you to contribute to my campaign for U.S. Senate as part of our end-of-year fundraising push. My hope is that you will give me a moment to explain why this request is so important. For too long, Mitch McConnell has turned the Senate into a place where good ideas go to die -- by blocking just about every common-sense bill that crosses his desk. Last time I checked, there are nearly 400 bills passed by House Democrats just piling up and collecting dust. The truth is, McConnell doesn't work for folks like you and me. He works for those who cut him hefty checks and fill his campaign coffers with special interest cash. We deserve better than this sort of pay-to-play politics. Next year, we have a unique opportunity to deliver the change millions of Americans have been waiting for. Democrats only need to flip four seats to take back the Senate, but holding strong in Minnesota is the key to victory. Chip in $10 or more toward our end-of-year goal to help us save Minnesota's Senate seat and put Democrats on a path to win the majority. Your contribution before the deadline would give our campaign the resources we need in the new year. If you've saved payment information with ActBlue Express, your donation will go through immediately: | | "" | | "" | "" | | "" | "" | | "=" This final FEC deadline is a critical moment for our campaign. We need to hunker down to reach our grassroots fundraising goal because we cannot afford to fall short -- not as we head into an election year. If we can muster the resources needed to build a winning campaign, then there's nothing Mitch McConnell or his dark money network can do to stop us. Pitch in today, if you can. Thanks for everything. -- Tina

name: Barry Goldwater Jr.
subject: Martha’s unmatched
disclaimer_text: Paid for by McSally for Senate, Inc
body:
I can't think of anyone else who embodies what my father, former Senator Barry Goldwater, and I stand for more than Martha McSally. | [ ](http://paracom.paramountcommunication.com/ct/53853993:sRSY-uvND:m:1:2105898951:85654D83E753312FA31F91829950DABE:r)
---
Dear N/A,

My family has long been associated with the Republican Party and conservative leaders who stand by the values of small government, free enterprise, personal responsibility and a strong national defense.

[**I can't think of anyone else who embodies what my father, former Senator Barry Goldwater, and I stand for more than Senator Martha McSally.**](http://paracom.paramountcommunication.com/ct/53853993:sRSY-uvND:m:1:2105898951:85654D83E753312FA31F91829950DABE:r)

| [**SUPPORT MARTHA MCSALLY** »](http://paracom.paramountcommunication.com/ct/53853993:sRSY-uvND:m:1:2105898951:85654D83E753312FA31F91829950DABE:r)
---

As a good friend of Martha's, I was proud to have supported her since her first days campaigning for U.S. Senate - where I personally joined in at her kick-off party in Phoenix.

Martha's resume is virtually unmatched in government today. She has impressive military and political experience including...
* Becoming the first **female fighter pilot to fly in combat** and first to command a fighter squadron in combat (354th Fighter Squadron) in United States history.
* Earning Distinguished Graduate honors at the U.S. Air Force Academy, graduating first in her class from the Air War College, and earning a 2nd master's degree from Harvard University's John F. Kennedy School of Government.
* Being a workhorse House legislator recognized as **one of the top 10 most effective** Members of Congress as a Freshman!

[**In the U.S. Senate, Martha McSally is proving that she is a patriot willing to hold steadfast to our Constitutional principles.**](http://paracom.paramountcommunication.com/ct/53853993:sRSY-uvND:m:1:2105898951:85654D83E753312FA31F91829950DABE:r)

With your help, Martha will become one of the strongest and most effective voices for freedom and the Republican Party. But as a newly appointed Senator who faces the voters again in 2020, Martha truly needs and deserves your help in this fight.

[**Please join me in supporting her campaign with your most generous gift of $2700, $1000, $500, $250, $100, $50, or $35.**](http://paracom.paramountcommunication.com/ct/53853993:sRSY-uvND:m:1:2105898951:85654D83E753312FA31F91829950DABE:r)

Sincerely,
[ ](http://paracom.paramountcommunication.com/ct/53853993:sRSY-uvND:m:1:2105898951:85654D83E753312FA31F91829950DABE:r)
Hon. Barry Goldwater, Jr.
U.S. Congressman (Ret.)

[**SUPPORT MARTHA MCSALLY** »](http://paracom.paramountcommunication.com/ct/53853993:sRSY-uvND:m:1:2105898951:85654D83E753312FA31F91829950DABE:r)
---

| Paid for by McSally for Senate, Inc.
---

name: Lashea Burt
subject: Ground team update
body:
|
---
Nice to meet you, folks. I’m Lashea, and I’ve been working with Charles Booker to spread the word about our movement across Kentucky. We’ve traveled the Commonwealth the past few weeks, meeting folks concerned about the economy in Whitesburg, protesting for climate action in Bowling Green, and mobilizing supporters in Paducah. If we’re going to keep up this momentum in the new year, we’ll need support from folks like you. I’ve seen firsthand what resources we need to make progress on the ground. Small-dollar donations we raise from emails like these help pay for resources for everything from knocking doors to making phone calls to printing costs. Your donation is putting a clipboard in the hands of a volunteer or a poster in the window of a supporter in a neighborhood we’re trying to reach. _****_**[The success of this movement depends on your support. Will you chip in $10 or more today to power this movement to defeat Mitch McConnell?](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/13097760/135543378/-1631903886?refcode=cbec20191221-nd_a1&amount=10&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMTAvMS83ODg4NCIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICI2OGNmM2Q5Ni0wZTI0LWVhMTEtYTYwMS0yODE4Nzg0ZDZkNjgiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=L-JtlRBvTPDjdveNnE-c_CT8qTMRCfSnO1jirG9a_Ws=)**_****_ _If you've saved your payment information with ActBlue Express, your donation will go through immediately:_ | | ****[Express Donate $10](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/13097761/135543379/-1631903886?express_lane=true&amount=10&refcode=cbec20191221-AB-nd&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMTAvMS83ODg4NCIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICI2OGNmM2Q5Ni0wZTI0LWVhMTEtYTYwMS0yODE4Nzg0ZDZkNjgiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=L-JtlRBvTPDjdveNnE-c_CT8qTMRCfSnO1jirG9a_Ws=)****

clean_body: | Nice to meet you, folks. I’m Lashea, and I’ve been working with Charles Booker to spread the word about our movement across Kentucky. We’ve traveled the Commonwealth the past few weeks, meeting folks concerned about the economy in Whitesburg, protesting for climate action in Bowling Green, and mobilizing supporters in Paducah. If we’re going to keep up this momentum in the new year, we’ll need support from folks like you. I’ve seen firsthand what resources we need to make progress on the ground. Small-dollar donations we raise from emails like these help pay for resources for everything from knocking doors to making phone calls to printing costs. Your donation is putting a clipboard in the hands of a volunteer or a poster in the window of a supporter in a neighborhood we’re trying to reach. **= If you've saved your payment information with ActBlue Express, your donation will go through immediately: | | = **** | = **** | = **** | = Thanks for doing your part so we have the resources we need to give all Kentuckians a voice and defeat Mitch McConnell. Lashea Burt Charles Booker Exploratory Coordinator = = Contributions to CBEC are not deductible for federal income tax purposes. While Mitch McConnell gets richer, our state gets poorer. As he gains power in Washington, our communities lose it in Kentucky. That’s why Charles Booker is seriously considering running for the U.S. Senate. But he wants to do this right. As he keeps traveling the state to have real conversations with real people, =** Charles Booker Exploratory Committee PO BOX 11081 Louisville, KY 40251 United States

name: Newt Gingrich
subject: It’s out of control
disclaimer_text: Paid for by the NRSC
body:
We should call Democrats' attacks what they are: A desperate attempt to stop President Trump from winning re-election. Chip in today and send a message to the far-left radicals.

Friend,

There is only one thing Democrats are truly passionate about and that is attacking President Trump. They aren't going to let FACTS distract from their need to smear our President.

All along, Republicans in the Senate have been fighting for hard-working Americans against the far left House Democrats - but they REALLY need help from grassroots conservatives like you. Only FOUR SEATS separate us from a Democrat-controlled Senate, and we cannot let Chuck Schumer be in charge. **Republican Senators are behind pace to meet their monthly goal** - [**Will you chip in today to defend President Trump 's Senate Majority? ALL gifts will be 2X MATCHED until midnight tonight!**](http://r20.rs6.net/tn.jsp?f=001clYCKrgieglgy5Xh_7Q8KlCf5v5KGlfsOWXhLh8Hr-EQoqhlWaRsq99LmCqjQZfEvPFWVxesUVTHRRAWG1j9AkQqG-dcA7WoLlkQpbTmhEZ_bx1Od9CXhyWvDEhQ4yHURnihHMfeMz_UsVzSv1dD062gE4jCzGpcltSBTvsUDLl9eb0yuVf4r4xpiNecJN9_RQZ9243hX0qwaUWg05hvOLnseLaDovNTh5yoy82SDBX8ujcPexf50pTHRIRHboAWnmkvOcLF9kTQpcZzBB_t0wRAaPNGkpRTDk3QRcBHZRCI6Sr5Yiw4YiEa_dccVoPvUlxIP3ViObpv_vqBkMNqTgCkrS0Fay58gLXZOVSp061-KMj-sKPOdYrMr1KpHF534xGX6dNSw17LiXfecMwbC37wtlUPcND7&c=0Dd4ueDRYFHPCpqJxakHc-Kr1i6tI4ufK77I_z_CmuM_xAMnAs8XTA==&ch=1pa_pnPP2KY5BWsGnnHwfrQPlhgaaQBCaofbnvzSOnG4YQCXnme7Fg==)

The theater of hate Pelosi and Schiff have put on is a desperate attempt to stop President Trump from winning reelection. **The Left 's agenda is getting more extreme by the day, but they are hoping smear campaigns and partisan tricks will be enough to distract Americans from their dangerous policies long enough to win the Senate and White House in 2020.**

**The only way Democrats can succeed is by silencing YOUR voice.** [**Send a message to the far-left radicals and make a 2x-matched donation to defend the Senate!**](http://r20.rs6.net/tn.jsp?f=001clYCKrgieglgy5Xh_7Q8KlCf5v5KGlfsOWXhLh8Hr-EQoqhlWaRsq99LmCqjQZfEblC6ckGsuBSjjJD7qMcEFfu-I0V0vsO-NkHrjvAddyAF_YVxyZvgeFLSdXeLqHlhnXGPHQPg_hsYDsO0hzWVc5e0YzUMYo-jLrfi-MIKx04KSqCAehhVsCYk_z8dSmbP0BW8SGDgfUtTJPHNvM-HKKLl7q0uEr-COpPGgmvQ8pSCFU91-hCI1e9ZjTN33SiVCp3MEzJbZHM1F-tqnA-RF6QqPXeKtrZ8aKuB0nDrqsHApFAjdC7No4dNyVwjvBzp9fZjjNrQ0S_o_TKQh195YNpC5DIbfmSjLXTEWRzL_pvoyid9_9EJPjJds5PmNf6haLYdHVgIk_bZax_Vm70oLMvb7iHoRhqo&c=0Dd4ueDRYFHPCpqJxakHc-Kr1i6tI4ufK77I_z_CmuM_xAMnAs8XTA==&ch=1pa_pnPP2KY5BWsGnnHwfrQPlhgaaQBCaofbnvzSOnG4YQCXnme7Fg==)

President Trump and his Senate allies have accomplished so much despite Democrats throwing up as many roadblocks as possible. Pelosi, Schiff, and the rest of the Democrats are terrified of what Republicans can accomplish with 4 more years of President Trump in the White House.

It would be devastating for the President's Republican allies in the Senate to miss their goal. _**Can we count on you and your conservative friends to step up?**_ [**Rush a 2x-matched donation now and stand with President Trump and his Senate allies!**](http://r20.rs6.net/tn.jsp?f=001clYCKrgieglgy5Xh_7Q8KlCf5v5KGlfsOWXhLh8Hr-EQoqhlWaRsq99LmCqjQZfEfNVWOiTLAyO0iEEB2658fITZO7SUA6fcAfOUUpw1O_egSkoJEMZQUR1q_AUmE9imzPyxSOHgbMHoig0oaNavdU8JdAWjfFqlOkMOsRXo1ETW5pwxzQOz_irH-OlmzDs5pyVq_u2LcV_3ICH_EuTAifNIks6WMriViKTCi4jDsid-sIr4L3JvMQJVXS1v23vHjA69EkjKyz7E5ZqUTVVxUdpqmKIOJAU5y77Y8q7kcYlpYh569tj947r9BBbkIEpaHaXh1iyBP0_8F-XpFNSZhh2NEZAQ_2zlNMp1ogGePWDUdKZRf4C5VK6dj0Xudth_yFJclQnx71ET6KT2s5hhZEp7gQRKEDn-&c=0Dd4ueDRYFHPCpqJxakHc-Kr1i6tI4ufK77I_z_CmuM_xAMnAs8XTA==&ch=1pa_pnPP2KY5BWsGnnHwfrQPlhgaaQBCaofbnvzSOnG4YQCXnme7Fg==)

Thank you for joining the fight.

Newt Gingrich

**[**DONATE NOW**](http://r20.rs6.net/tn.jsp?f=001clYCKrgieglgy5Xh_7Q8KlCf5v5KGlfsOWXhLh8Hr-EQoqhlWaRsq99LmCqjQZfEHjPDn1WP-UU3Ah68bqYM2Mz1SzjNenRhBc9UyP6G35069p3OfHNANxp8p_fNiOyeK77djQo3DXq2m6RgqFy32vktgtPqVipXGap7FSNc9eBaJnWlAbj5xREHozomyzx0vceVdWHUm3WzuGco53_wN5TmwQKLHzMayZaa7VLFFQ62MWtqQcXD0bCqw4MfqsBwcNi5XwoIfh2MPa8cMzR7kZ1vf-kPW5Qkoitfd0BAVUmTil5pKb51X0vY0Erd6XKw6gMDvKTubt4-Wny1JjQvQKCBsI2752r9oGhJ_dkiNxGIq5WwMbxf-UsEBT6fvG6XFVh-kemT5jqw0fBTMnUlWpAAJIQYDFzCSTPPHJJzZtM=&c=0Dd4ueDRYFHPCpqJxakHc-Kr1i6tI4ufK77I_z_CmuM_xAMnAs8XTA==&ch=1pa_pnPP2KY5BWsGnnHwfrQPlhgaaQBCaofbnvzSOnG4YQCXnme7Fg==)**

name: April and John Delaney
subject: Happy Holidays
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Friends of John Delaney
body:
We are staying in the fight and are asking that you get to know John better. | |
---
Dear Friends, Our family loves the holidays! For all 30 years of our marriage, we have sent out an annual holiday family message. This 2019 holiday note was not written by consultants, but rather is penned straight from my heart as John's spouse. I want people to know who we are, what John stands for, and why we undertook this incredible journey. Our goal was always to bring this country together, to lift it up in common purpose, and to be guided by faith, truth, love, and grace. These past two years have been an amazing journey, and John has given his heart and soul to it. As an entrepreneur and visionary, he believes our country must work together to solve problems. He believes the hard path is telling the truth, focusing on the future, and showing up in forgotten communities. He has visited all 99 counties in Iowa, covered all of New Hampshire, done over 600 events, written a book, The Right Answer, **[and laid out his vision for America in a 30-minute TV Special](https://go.johndelaney.com/page/m/29b900c7/30fd46cd/32c78bc3/2357117b/3318511253/VEsH/?g=O8raRzpTVzRcsC_9bxO1vUA "https://www.johndelaney.com/solutions?utm_medium=email&utm_source=johndelaney&utm_content=1+-+and+laid+out+his+vision+for+America+in+a&utm_campaign=em_na_2019.12.17_holidaycard&source=em_na_2019.12.17_holidaycard")**. John's campaign motto -- Leadership. Unity. Vision. -- reflects the values we believe in. He's the son of a union electrician and the first in his family to attend college. As an Idaho potato farmer's daughter, I met John at Georgetown Law Center. Only in America, right? After we married, John went on to create two New York Stock Exchange listed companies, creating thousands of jobs and providing financing to thousands of small businesses. We always gave back to our community and John became a Member of Congress from Maryland in 2012. He believes that **" the cost of doing nothing is not nothing"** and that our toxic gridlock has hurt Americans. Our work -- as a couple -- was focused on building relationships across the aisle. We believe that bringing our country together, working towards improving the lives of working-class Americans, and making smart investments in our future is the best means to make a difference. And we believe that these ideals are the roadmap for winning the White House. While most of John's ideas have now been adopted by the other 2020 candidates, John's unique distinction is still his background; John is from a blue-collar family and he is the only 2020 candidate that has been both an entrepreneur/business leader and Member of Congress. We are staying in the fight and are asking that you get to know John better. The economic issues facing this country -- particularly in rural America -- are John's principal focus. **[Please tune into the 30-minute TV Special on John airing this month on television, or check it out at johndelaney.com/solutions](https://go.johndelaney.com/page/m/29b900c7/30fd46cd/32c78bc3/2357117a/3318511253/VEsE/?g=O8raRzpTVzRcsC_9bxO1vUA "https://www.johndelaney.com/solutions?utm_medium=email&utm_source=johndelaney&utm_content=2+-+Please+tune+into+the+30minute+TV+Special&utm_campaign=em_na_2019.12.17_holidaycard&source=em_na_2019.12.17_holidaycard")**. Most importantly, please focus on his record as a problem solver and his achievable solutions to address equality of opportunity, climate change, health care, and toxic partisanship and gridlock. Every Christmas Eve our entire family watches the holiday classic, "The Polar Express." We are always touched by the little boy who comes to believe ... to believe in the spirit of Christmas, in faith, in others, and in something beyond ourselves. We, too, believe... and **we believe with leadership, unity, and vision that our country can step forward with faith and lift up in common purpose**. God bless you and keep you during this holiday season, and together we can look toward 2020 with hope and optimism. With warmest wishes,

April and John Delaney

| | Paid for by Friends of John Delaney
---
PO Box 70835, Bethesda, MD 20813
This email was sent to: [dpwillis67@gmail.com](https://go.johndelaney.com/page/m/29b900c7/30fd46cd/32c78bc3/23571165/3318511253/VEsF/?g=O8raRzpTVzRcsC_9bxO1vUA "https://go.johndelaney.com/page/s/update-your-information?utm_medium=email&utm_source=johndelaney&utm_content=3+-+EMAIL&utm_campaign=em_na_2019.12.17_holidaycard&source=em_na_2019.12.17_holidaycard"). After we married, John went on to create two New York Stock Exchange listed companies, creating thousands of jobs and providing financing to thousands of small businesses. We always gave back to our community and John became a Member of Congress from Maryland in 2012. He believes that " the cost of doing nothing is not nothing" and that our toxic gridlock has hurt Americans. Our work -- as a couple -- was focused on building relationships across the aisle. We believe that bringing our country together, working towards improving the lives of working-class Americans, and making smart investments in our future is the best means to make a difference. And we believe that these ideals are the roadmap for winning the White House. While most of John's ideas have now been adopted by the other 2020 candidates, John's unique distinction is still his background; John is from a blue-collar family and he is the only 2020 candidate that has been both an entrepreneur/business leader and Member of Congress. We are staying in the fight and are asking that you get to know John better. The economic issues facing this country -- particularly in rural America -- are John's principal focus. "". Most importantly, please focus on his record as a problem solver and his achievable solutions to address equality of opportunity, climate change, health care, and toxic partisanship and gridlock. Every Christmas Eve our entire family watches the holiday classic, "The Polar Express." We are always touched by the little boy who comes to believe ... to believe in the spirit of Christmas, in faith, in others, and in something beyond ourselves. We, too, believe... and we believe with leadership, unity, and vision that our country can step forward with faith and lift up in common purpose. God bless you and keep you during this holiday season, and together we can look toward 2020 with hope and optimism. With warmest wishes, April and John Delaney | | Paid for by Friends of John Delaney PO Box 70835, Bethesda, MD 20813

subject: the money vs. the many

body:

**Early voting is less than two months away and by now it 's clear that this campaign is about the money vs. the many!** Senator John Cornyn has a nearly $11 million war chest thanks to help from corporate PACs, and his special interest allies are planning to spend millions more to help him win re-election.

MJ isn't taking corporate PAC money -- she's relying on this grassroots team instead. And in a battle between the money and the many, **we need to show Sen. Cornyn just how many of us there are![Can you pitch in today?](https://secure.mjfortexas.com/page/m/64890696/7f51f7bc/4a04d0c0/4ef0c72b/917441264/VEsF/p/eyJKU1ZOUVVsTVNVNUhTVVFsSlE9PSI6IjY1NiJ9/?g=f7VweDpTVzRduSR3BPpGv5A "https://secure.actblue.com/donate/mj-3drive?refcode=email_20191221.1nd__656__&amount=3&recurring=true")**

We don't need to match Sen. Cornyn's millions dollar-for-dollar. We just need to raise enough to spread MJ's message and build a Texas-sized grassroots movement that can WIN on Election Day. But with early voting beginning February 18th, we're running out of time!

**So far, 24,279 supporters have pitched in to help us reach our 25,000 donation goal. Will you pitch in $3 now to help us get to 25,000?**

name: =?utf-8?Q?Marc=20Flores?=
subject: I need to be honest with you.
body:
Good morning Peter,
I need to be honest with you.

With the municipal races behind us, and the holidays ahead, our campaign is not where it needs to be if we are going to win the primary in March.

What does this mean?
Volunteers are dwindling, and donations are becoming less frequent. The end of the year financial deadline is coming up, and we are behind in reaching our fundraising goals.

Thus far, your contributions have provided for us to reach out to voters through ads and by canvassing to inform them of my campaign, and how I plan on making a difference in the district. However, if something doesn't change soon, we will fall behind our opponents.

What can you do?
If you donate $15 today (https://secure.actblue.com/donate/marcflores?utm_source=Marc+Flores+for+Congress&utm_campaign=404ce5d49e-EMAIL_CAMPAIGN_2019_12_20_07_38&utm_medium=email&utm_term=0_b08c1b6182-404ce5d49e-32267927) , you can help us print and send out mailers to voters, so that we can remind them of my issues, and notify them of the election dates, times, and locations so they can get to the polls and vote.

Donate $15 (http://secure.actblue.com/donate/marcflores?utm_source=Marc+Flores+for+Congress&utm_campaign=404ce5d49e-EMAIL_CAMPAIGN_2019_12_20_07_38&utm_medium=email&utm_term=0_b08c1b6182-404ce5d49e-32267927)
You can also sign up to be a volunteer (https://www.marcfloresforcongress.com/volunteer/?utm_source=Marc+Flores+for+Congress&utm_campaign=404ce5d49e-EMAIL_CAMPAIGN_2019_12_20_07_38&utm_medium=email&utm_term=0_b08c1b6182-404ce5d49e-32267927) to help us talk to, call, text, and send letters to our voters. Every little bit of help counts, so even if it's just once a week, it can make all the difference.

Become a Volunteer (https://www.marcfloresforcongress.com/volunteer/?utm_source=Marc+Flores+for+Congress&utm_campaign=404ce5d49e-EMAIL_CAMPAIGN_2019_12_20_07_38&utm_medium=email&utm_term=0_b08c1b6182-404ce5d49e-32267927)
https://youtu.be/OkfRCGcGSvQ?utm_source=Marc+Flores+for+Congress&utm_campaign=404ce5d49e-EMAIL_CAMPAIGN_2019_12_20_07_38&utm_medium=email&utm_term=0_b08c1b6182-404ce5d49e-32267927
Check out our latest video:
We have been hard at work knocking on doors, reaching out to voters, and hearing what changes they want to see within the district.

As you can see in the video above, block walking is grueling and time consuming work, but it is the foundation of our campaign. Because I am so committed to meeting voters, I have not spent as much time raising money as my opponents.

To stay ahead, and keep up our practice of putting the voters first, and fundraising second, we need your help. Together, we can rally. Together, we can do better.

Contribute Here (http://actblue.com/donate/marcflores?utm_source=Marc+Flores+for+Congress&utm_campaign=404ce5d49e-EMAIL_CAMPAIGN_2019_12_20_07_38&utm_medium=email&utm_term=0_b08c1b6182-404ce5d49e-32267927)

Express Donate: $5 (https://secure.actblue.com/donate/marcflores?express_lane=true&amount=5&refcode=express_lane_5&utm_source=Marc+Flores+for+Congress&utm_campaign=404ce5d49e-EMAIL_CAMPAIGN_2019_12_20_07_38&utm_medium=email&utm_term=0_b08c1b6182-404ce5d49e-32267927)

Express Donate: $10 (https://secure.actblue.com/donate/marcflores?express_lane=true&amount=10&refcode=express_lane_10&utm_source=Marc+Flores+for+Congress&utm_campaign=404ce5d49e-EMAIL_CAMPAIGN_2019_12_20_07_38&utm_medium=email&utm_term=0_b08c1b6182-404ce5d49e-32267927)

Express Donate: $25 (https://secure.actblue.com/donate/marcflores?express_lane=true&amount=25&refcode=express_lane_25&utm_source=Marc+Flores+for+Congress&utm_campaign=404ce5d49e-EMAIL_CAMPAIGN_2019_12_20_07_38&utm_medium=email&utm_term=0_b08c1b6182-404ce5d49e-32267927)

Or, donate another amount (https://secure.actblue.com/donate/marcflores?refcode=express_lane_other&utm_source=Marc+Flores+for+Congress&utm_campaign=404ce5d49e-EMAIL_CAMPAIGN_2019_12_20_07_38&utm_medium=email&utm_term=0_b08c1b6182-404ce5d49e-32267927)

Let's build a better district, and a better nation, together.

Thank you,

Marc

name: Mark Warner
subject: I'm calling for Mr. Barr's resignation
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Friends of Mark Warner
body:
The Attorney General's habit of substituting partisan spin for the facts has undermined whatever credibility he brought to the job, and I think the American people deserve better.
|
---
| | Derek,

Last week, the Department of Justice released a long-awaited report into the origins of the Russia investigation. Contrary to what President Trump and his allies have been claiming for three years, the report found no evidence that the investigation -- which exposed criminal activity by the President's campaign manager, national security adviser, and other top aides -- was influenced by political bias.

But you wouldn't know that from listening to Attorney General Bill Barr. Mr. Barr went on national television and, instead of accepting the findings of a non-partisan, two-year investigation, proceeded to attack the men and women of federal law enforcement, mislead the American people, and try to provide political cover for the President.

Frankly, the Attorney General's habit of substituting partisan spin for the facts has undermined whatever credibility he brought to the job, and I think the American people deserve better. I've called on the Attorney General to resign before, but this latest attempt to rewrite history makes it even more clear we need new leadership in the Justice Department.

**[If you agree, will you sign my petition and join me in calling for Attorney General Barr's resignation today?](https://act.markwarnerva.com/page/m/7e85d70c/53d9897e/5387a040/1c89c22f/3111385201/VEsH/?g=fQCtPq_HJ6FdDGwS5GeylnA "https://act.markwarnerva.com/page/s/warner-barrresign2")** **[Sign My Petition >>>](https://act.markwarnerva.com/page/m/7e85d70c/53d9897e/5387a040/1c89c22f/3111385201/VEsE/?g=fQCtPq_HJ6FdDGwS5GeylnA "https://act.markwarnerva.com/page/s/warner-barrresign2")** I was one of the first Senators to oppose Attorney General Barr's nomination because our nation's top law enforcement officer has a responsibility to defend the rule of law, not the personal interests of the President.

Time and again, the Attorney General has failed to live up to that standard. I think the American people deserve better. If you agree, I hope you'll add your name and join me in calling for Mr. Barr's resignation.

Sincerely,
Mark Warner | **[CONTRIBUTE](https://act.markwarnerva.com/page/m/7e85d70c/53d9897e/5387a040/1c89c22e/3111385201/VEsF/p/eyJKU1ZOUVVsTVNVNUhTVVFsSlE9PSI6IjQwMSJ9/?g=fQCtPq_HJ6FdDGwS5GeylnA "https://secure.actblue.com/donate/warner-db?refcode=20191221_p_1_fl__401__&refcode2=cont&amount=10")**
---

|
---

Friends of Mark Warner
1490-5A Quarterpath Road #213
Williamsburg, VA 23185

[Unsubscribe](https://act.markwarnerva.com/page/m/7e85d70c/53d9897e/5387a040/1c89c22d/3111385201/VEsC/?g=fQCtPq_HJ6FdDGwS5GeylnA "https://act.markwarnerva.com/unsubscribe")

name: Donald J. Trump
subject: Our Founders would be disappointed
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Trump Make America Great Again Committee, a joint fundraising committee authorized by and composed of Donald J
body:
This is not what they had in mind. |
---
| | | | | | | | [](http://click.campaigns.rnchq.com/?qs=f78e0cbdf941174c2b7af6500dd6bd15ecd6285491e64b8827d1593c91b41a4f96fc243b9b1fc25cb9fcb10487a77588dee4c555abfba3c1)
---

Friend,

Can you believe that I was impeached by the Radical Left, Do Nothing Democrats, AND I DID NOTHING WRONG?

Nervous Nancy, Adam Shifty Schiff, and Jerry, despite their denials, have been putting so much pressure on their minions to impeach me. They want to remove me from office, and yet they've been the ones breaking the law in so many ways.

There has been absolutely NO due process throughout this entire scam and they've been LYING to the American People about me. They've gotten so pathetic that even a member of their own party has abandoned them.

The Democrats have chosen to REJECT the FACTS and to put partisan politics over the voice of the American People. They don't care about you, Friend. They never have and they never will.

As your President, I will NEVER let them silence you. It's time we do something so HUGE, so INCREDIBLE that even the Democrats won't be able to ignore us.

_**The new goal is now $12 MILLION**_ to show the Left that REAL PATRIOTS don't support this IMPEACHMENT WITCH HUNT.
---
|
I need to know you're with me. I noticed you haven't contributed yet to this critical goal so I wanted to reach out to remind you that **I 've authorized a short-term TRIPLE-MATCH on ALL CONTRIBUTIONS.**

**[Please contribute ANY AMOUNT RIGHT NOW to help CRUSH our $12,000,000 goal and to defend me from this nasty Witch Hunt.>>](http://click.campaigns.rnchq.com/?qs=562b87e498a6deec5c676aa78ae28318283f2c7d40d326694994f72d6fbb9e2e2656a11b79372dbee781c9d32d0f6f069e2fb252274dee72)**

| So team, we told you a few days ago that we needed to raise $800,000 more before the end of the year to make this the best fundraising quarter of our campaign and help us qualify for the January debate. **We 're pleased to report that since then, we've raised $326,720 towards our goal -- meaning we have just $473,280 left to raise.** This is encouraging news, but we're going to have to keep hustling to get all the way there. And with the holidays around the corner, it's really important that we don't let up. **Can you donate right now to help ensure that we end this quarter as strong as possible?** If you've saved your payment information with ActBlue Express, your donation will go through immediately: | | | [](https://act.corybooker.%3D/?g=IiwAaFH8x8VcsCn-MvZWseA "https://secure.actblue.com/donate/cory2020-em-december?refcode=em_fr_20191221_BHQ_20191221-fr-BHQ-EM1-actives_actives_express5&amount=5&express_lane=true&email=dpwillis67@gmail.com&firstname=&lastname=&city=Cresco&state=PA&zip=18326&phone=&occupation=&employer=&amounts=5,10,22,50,100")

As more on this story keeps coming in, it becomes even more unbelievable. The father of Chabot's campaign manager was listed as campaign treasurer, **but he said he never did that job.**
More than $100,000 has _mysteriously_ gone missing from Chabot's re-election campaign -- and the campaign paid $57,000 to his campaign manager's companies for "unknown purposes."
**It 's clear Chabot is fully entangled in corruption at its most egregious** \-- which makes his tendency to rubber stamp Trump's corruption even less surprising.
We have enough political leaders embroiled in controversy, it's time to send Chabot into retirement. If you chip in any amount today, you'll have a powerful impact on the fight for big, structural change -- including universal child care, high-quality public schools, universal free public college... | | | [](https://my.elizabethwarren.com/page/m/2852bc65/45c30650/116ce5122/66fa6add/2189956297/VEsH/p/eyJKU1ZsYldGcGJDVWwiOiJkcHdpbGxpczY3QGdtYWlsLmNvbSIsIkpTVm1hWEp6ZEc1aGJXVWxKUT09IjoiIiwiSlNWc1lYTjBibUZ0WlNVbCI6IiIsIkpTVjZhWEFsSlE9PSI6IjE4MzI2In0%3D/?g=4qwscq_HJ6FcsC0VbCsFfMA "https://elizabethwarren.com?source=em-header&email=dpwillis67@gmail.com&firstname=&lastname=&zip=18326")

We're sending everyone who joins this movement in the next 24 hours a FREE sticker to thank them for being a part of this fight.

This is a team effort, and Elizabeth can't fight for big, structural change without people like you -- people who are knocking on doors, talking to friends and family about our movement, and chipping in a few dollars at a time to send Elizabeth to the White House.

That's why we're so thankful for every single person who has decided they're tired of the status quo. Hundreds of thousands of people nationwide have made it clear: we need big, structural change, and we're ready to fight for it.

**Are you ready to join this fight? We wouldn 't be asking if it weren't important.

[Chip in any amount today -- whether it's $1, $2, or $5, anything you can give would have a powerful impact -- and let us know where we should send your FREE sticker!](https://my.elizabethwarren.com/page/m/2852bc65/45c30650/116ce5122/66fa6adf/2189956297/VEsE/p/eyJKU1ZsYldGcGJDVWwiOiJkcHdpbGxpczY3QGdtYWlsLmNvbSIsImUzc2dkWEpzSUgxOSI6ImV3LWRlYzE5ZnItc3RpY2tlciIsImUzc2djbVZtWTI5a1pTQjlmUT09IjoiRU1NOTBGX1NUS19CU0NfQ18yMDE5MTIyMV9WMVMxX1AifQ%3D%3D/?g=4qwscq_HJ6FcsC0VbCsFfMA "https://secure.elizabethwarren.com/donate/ew-dec19fr-sticker?email=dpwillis67@gmail.com&refcode=EMM90F_STK_BSC_C_20191221_V1S1_P")** [](https://my.elizabethwarren.com/page/m/2852bc65/45c30650/116ce5122/66fa6adf/2189956297/VEsF/p/eyJKU1ZsYldGcGJDVWwiOiJkcHdpbGxpczY3QGdtYWlsLmNvbSIsImUzc2dkWEpzSUgxOSI6ImV3LWRlYzE5ZnItc3RpY2tlciIsImUzc2djbVZtWTI5a1pTQjlmUT09IjoiRU1NOTBGX1NUS19CU0NfQ18yMDE5MTIyMV9WMVMxX1AifQ%3D%3D/?g=4qwscq_HJ6FcsC0VbCsFfMA "https://secure.elizabethwarren.com/donate/ew-dec19fr-sticker?email=dpwillis67@gmail.com&refcode=EMM90F_STK_BSC_C_20191221_V1S1_P") | _If you've saved payment info with ActBlue Express, your donation will process automatically:_

name: When Democrats Turn Out
subject: USA Today poll: Trump beats Biden by 3
disclaimer_text: Paid for by When Democrats Turn Out PAC
body:
|
---

| | "WASHINGTON - President Donald Trump, the first modern president to face impeachment during his first term in the White House, now leads his top Democratic rivals in his bid for a second, a new USA TODAY/Suffolk University Poll finds. "The national survey, taken as the House of Representatives planned an impeachment vote and the Senate a trial, showed Trump defeating former Vice President Joe Biden by 3 percentage points, Vermont Sen. Bernie Sanders by 5 points, and Massachusetts Sen. Elizabeth Warren by 8 points. "In hypothetical head-to-head contests, Trump also led South Bend, Indiana, Mayor Pete Buttigieg by 10 points and former New York City Mayor Michael Bloomberg by 9." \-- _USA Today_ Given the rapid shift in support toward President Trump, we need to know if your feelings toward him have changed. **Will you vote for Trump in 2020?** [YES](https://turnoutpac.bsd.net/page/m/78bcdf64/6e9863e8/174b7371/1db04a37/786738602/VEsH/?g=mj_BT60LBwxdW4nnt4whVXA "https://s.surveyplanet.com/PLQ3p21H") [NO](https://turnoutpac.bsd.net/page/m/78bcdf64/6e9863e8/174b7371/1db04a37/786738602/VEsE/?g=mj_BT60LBwxdW4nnt4whVXA "https://s.surveyplanet.com/PLQ3p21H") Thank you for your response, WDTO Team [DONATE](https://turnoutpac.bsd.net/page/m/78bcdf64/6e9863e8/174b7371/1db04a34/786738602/VEsF/?g=mj_BT60LBwxdW4nnt4whVXA "https://secure.actblue.com/donate/when-democrats-turn-out-nd?refcode=OUT20191221a.ND&refcode2=DrUilPEdsKHAhRVLQi7S")
---
|
---

Washington, DC 20003

The days around the holidays are difficult for fundraising.

But while the donations slow down, the campaign is only heating up, and we need the resources to stay on track toward our crucial end-of-year goals.

**[Can you make a donation right now so we remain on pace?](https://act.yang2020.com/go/20216?t=5&akid=4999%2E377263%2EhLHneQ)** _If you've saved payment information with ActBlue Express, your donation will go through immediately:_ | | [$10 »](https://act.yang2020.com/go/20216?t=6&express_lane=true&amount=10&akid=4999%2E377263%2EhLHneQ)

As usual, the holidays just so happen to coincide with our end-of-quarter filing deadline. We’ve been solidly in the top five for months now, but if we can release an eye-popping fundraising report in January, our campaign will become the center of attention.

That’s where you come in, Yang Gang. You’ve been the backbone of our campaign all year long. **We have the highest proportion of small-dollar donors of any candidate running. That means without your support, this campaign grinds to a halt.**

We can’t let anything slow us down. Especially not with our FEC deadline in just 10 days.

**Donate now:[https://act.yang2020.com/go/end-of-year](https://act.yang2020.com/go/20216?t=12)**

Thanks for everything you do,

Team Yang
**We don't have corporate PACs or big donors who can close the fundraising gap we face, just grassroots donors like you powering this campaign. Please give now.** | [Contribute](https://act.yang2020.com/go/20216?t=13&akid=4999%2E377263%2EhLHneQ)

Taking a Stand for our Democracy Indivisible Eugene endorses Canning for Congress. Indivisible Eugene Endorses Doyle Canning for Congress in Oregon 04 at "Impeachment Eve" Rally of 700 people. Eugene -- Indivisible Eugene made their first endorsement in the 2020 election Tuesday at an Impeachment Eve rally with Democratic Congressional candidate Doyle Canning. The grassroots group is backing her insurgent congressional bid to unseat 33-year incumbent, Pete DeFazio in the May 19 primary. The boysterious rally was attended by over 700 people and organized as part of a wave of 600 similar events coordinated by a coalition that includes Move On, the Women's March, Indivisible, and other progressive networks that drew over 200,000 nationwide. Canning riled up the crowd saying, "We're here tonight because we deserve better. We're in this fight, because weak leadership and a failure to stand up to the corruption and racism of this administration and corporate money in politics have led to a crisis for our communities and our country. That's why I'm running and that's why Indivisible Eugene is backing my campaign for Congress in 2020." The Indivisible endorsement was announced by Jerry Samaniego who said, "We need a leader who doesn't need to be pushed by us to do the right thing. We need a leader who instead is already out front leading the way and pushing for us."
---

clean_body: | | | | Taking a Stand for our Democracy Indivisible Eugene endorses Canning for Congress. Indivisible Eugene Endorses Doyle Canning for Congress in Oregon 04 at "Impeachment Eve" Rally of 700 people. Eugene -- Indivisible Eugene made their first endorsement in the 2020 election Tuesday at an Impeachment Eve rally with Democratic Congressional candidate Doyle Canning. The grassroots group is backing her insurgent congressional bid to unseat 33-year incumbent, Pete DeFazio in the May 19 primary. The boysterious rally was attended by over 700 people and organized as part of a wave of 600 similar events coordinated by a coalition that includes Move On, the Women's March, Indivisible, and other progressive networks that drew over 200,000 nationwide. Canning riled up the crowd saying, "We're here tonight because we deserve better. We're in this fight, because weak leadership and a failure to stand up to the corruption and racism of this administration and corporate money in politics have led to a crisis for our communities and our country. That's why I'm running and that's why Indivisible Eugene is backing my campaign for Congress in 2020." The Indivisible endorsement was announced by Jerry Samaniego who said, "We need a leader who doesn't need to be pushed by us to do the right thing. We need a leader who instead is already out front leading the way and pushing for us." | | IN THE NEWS | "Looking ahead to 2020, Doyle Canning, a longtime activist and Occupy participant, is challenging a 33-year incumbent, seemingly awash in corporate campaign cash, in Oregon's 4th congressional district..." - | ANNOUNCEMENTS | Thank you to everyone who chipped in to help us reach this important fundraising milestone! Nice to meet you — I’m Matt! I’m excited to introduce myself as the new Field Director for Team Mondaire. My job is to create a game plan so we can reach out to as many voters as possible and talk about why Mondaire is the best choice in this race for rea | | | Hi Friend, **** **** Nice to meet you — I’m Matt! **I’m excited to introduce myself as the new Field Director for Team Mondaire.** My job is to create a game plan so we can reach out to as many voters as possible and talk about why Mondaire is the best choice in this race _for real change, for working-class families._ But before I can even put this game plan into motion, I need to make sure we have the funds to pull this off. **Organizing My job is to create a game plan so we can reach out to as many voters as possible and talk about why Mondaire is the best choice in this race for real change, for working-class families. But before I can even put this game plan into motion, I need to make sure we have the funds to pull this off. name: When Democrats Turn Out
subject: POLITICO: "Pelosi has roared back in the Trump era"
disclaimer_text: Paid for by When Democrats Turn Out PAC
body:
|
---

| | Our president is a threat to our democracy, Peter. That's why the House impeached the president on charges of abuse of power and obstruction of Congress. While Trump has been desperately trying to undercut her authority, Speaker Pelosi held the caucus together and held Trump accountable. The GOP spent the impeachment debate yelling and screaming about anything but the truth to deliberately confuse the public because they have no defense for Trump's actions and they'll do anything to hold on to power. Speaker Pelosi is leading the charge against the White House and Republican obstruction and criminal behavior, but she can't be the only one. Engaged Democrats across the country need to have her back as we head into the next election. We need to hear from you today: **Do you support Nancy Pelosi?** [**YES**](https://turnoutpac.bsd.net/page/m/78bcdf14/6e9863e8/174486a0/1db04a3e/101395837/VEsH/?g=mj_BT60LBwxdW4nnt4whVXA "https://s.surveyplanet.com/eVA4RwD9") [NO](https://turnoutpac.bsd.net/page/m/78bcdf14/6e9863e8/174486a0/1db04a3e/101395837/VEsE/?g=mj_BT60LBwxdW4nnt4whVXA "https://s.surveyplanet.com/eVA4RwD9") Thank you, The WDTO Team [DONATE](https://turnoutpac.bsd.net/page/m/78bcdf14/6e9863e8/174486a0/1db04a3d/101395837/VEsF/?g=mj_BT60LBwxdW4nnt4whVXA "https://secure.actblue.com/donate/when-democrats-turn-out-nd?refcode=OUT20191221b.ND&refcode2=T0tHXU15tw5EYQwoQDhb")

name: Hickenlooper 2020
subject: This email is going to make you happy, folks
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Hickenlooper for Colorado
body:
|
#
Here we go, folks! [](https://secure.hickenlooper.?g=Wvb-QcQot1BcsCb456pUfvA "http://secure.actblue.com/donate/jwh-em-191220-eoy?refcode=em-191221-cook-full&amounts=5,10,25,50,100,150,250&firstname=&lastname=&email=dpwillis67@gmail.com&addr1=&city=Cresco&state=PA&zip=18326&phone=&employer=&occupation=") Democrats are in a strong position to win the Senate majority from Mitch McConnell in 2020, but there is no path unless we win this critical Senate race in Colorado next year. This election could make or break our chances at taking back our government, which is why we're asking: [**Can you make a contribution to support John Hickenlooper 's campaign for Senate in Colorado? We have a strong chance to defeat a Republican incumbent and put Democrats one step closer to flipping the Senate next year. Chip in here, if you can afford it:**](https://secure.hickenlooper.?g=Wvb-QcQot1BcsCb456pUfvA "http://secure.actblue.com/donate/jwh-em-191220-eoy?refcode=em-191221-cook-full&amounts=5,10,25,50,100,150,250&firstname=&lastname=&email=dpwillis67@gmail.com&addr1=&city=Cresco&state=PA&zip=18326&phone=&employer=&occupation=") [](https://secure.hickenlooper.?g=Wvb-QcQot1BcsCb456pUfvA "https://secure.actblue.com/donate/jwh-em-191220-eoy?refcode=em-191221-cook-full&amounts=5,10,25,50,100,150,250&firstname=&lastname=&email=dpwillis67@gmail.com&addr1=&city=Cresco&state=PA&zip=18326&phone=&employer=&occupation=") Everything is on the line in this election. We cannot afford to fall short if we're going to take back the Senate and get to work on the critical issues that matter to folks in this country, like health care, climate change, and more. Thanks for stepping up! -- Team Hick | [DONATE TODAY](https://secure.hickenlooper.?g=Wvb-QcQot1BcsCb456pUfvA "https://secure.actblue.com/donate/jwh-em-191220-eoy?refcode=em-191221-cook-full&amounts=5,10,25,50,100,150,250&firstname=&lastname=&email=dpwillis67@gmail.com&addr1=&city=Cresco&state=PA&zip=18326&phone=&employer=&occupation=")

Let's do this, Team Sara **** ""** Sara Gideon for Maine PO Box 812 South Freeport, ME 04078

Friend,

This is a huge moment for my campaign and if I’m being honest with you, _I’m starting to get nervous_. **[In 10 days I will be facing my end of year fundraising deadline and if I can’t beat this goal](http://links.action.supportarpaioforsheriff.com/u/click?_t=c4565dd37122495e8dd51204fa7fda1e&_m=14ef61d11a1c4576b9955c35dead8241&_e=-VI8FXCwGnsiyA6Owxgx9kWSzbVF6mSb3MX3vjqc5vAo2xoO65CkQWs91mek99BbcES8T7TIJMCn7GLJ6nzG6_IyaEwseVZHlhAqpVX52_prPdMDWUtboFWdxD2sJvQnwMf1PZkvvrMan-DwKtAfta500HKSlhUtg9X6Gh5gTr3PWo64k5KnvUAqX7hmE198e9AyUiUya1lkYX9OzFse1-3T4_znoyaByeK2FuaZGjsasHE_aVz6sOafbBjyvG8MnkLZwJhwdkZJGIAhxCjOqP5vKh0Y_IaOjM3n7c8x_Lzkn5jIePJqogOrBdCSj4p_fG0H1I23WN3Vub6leBQfQDHQa4KJhASML-z9LtLsORgXKO008iDCoKUbaVhIaEWv)** – I WILL BE FORCED TO DROP OUT.

There’s no sugarcoating it. I’m behind and running out of gas. **[Friend, will you pitch in $25 or more to help fuel my fight and stave off the Left’s desperate efforts?](http://links.action.supportarpaioforsheriff.com/u/click?_t=c4565dd37122495e8dd51204fa7fda1e&_m=14ef61d11a1c4576b9955c35dead8241&_e=-VI8FXCwGnsiyA6Owxgx9kWSzbVF6mSb3MX3vjqc5vAo2xoO65CkQWs91mek99BbcES8T7TIJMCn7GLJ6nzG6_IyaEwseVZHlhAqpVX52_prPdMDWUtboFWdxD2sJvQnwMf1PZkvvrMan-DwKtAftVPO63guhY96GccJNTiJsdyyjPM_nT4aEcjgnErCuqI6BUmdLp56jKbS8a_GLu9rNsORR_chPtIIfSWk4CB9bTRpVAJE9OkDPwdbh3U2zXhCGc-8TB7mAN6aTI0mx34sAVHKNhaGfa8RhBQgFLiSoMY4-STe6rgoAm_HV_HKbw_aEUeuPTkZsfSEhL6kcyvcK6K0qRVLdX5kYWQmIlgv4tZMfndKqv7D8cTCVDRoAMjAs5b9pNYETtBvkqZ3wZcTog%3D%3D)**
[](http://links.action.supportarpaioforsheriff.com/u/click?_t=c4565dd37122495e8dd51204fa7fda1e&_m=14ef61d11a1c4576b9955c35dead8241&_e=-VI8FXCwGnsiyA6Owxgx9kWSzbVF6mSb3MX3vjqc5vAo2xoO65CkQWs91mek99BbcES8T7TIJMCn7GLJ6nzG6_IyaEwseVZHlhAqpVX52_prPdMDWUtboFWdxD2sJvQnwMf1PZkvvrMan-DwKtAfta500HKSlhUtg9X6Gh5gTr0Ysl58KxcgctxziMppPS1aWeR5e-Rr4FQ0PWWq07VCKWoXCla9BisBknUWoIQJXdwnANWxQzFrR5fiY2XcZCF8D_vms4W1T1u0GozU5fXjvHKO7wrRebEb1wmioW8RQtfRc9gSBLbAGt7GTUnEqtt4zTgWV3r9uA_pu0qLsrl1AdAWqcl0rd-KxLx3j_iqDSdLkAkMTgHmNO2oJL5Ih2tf) | [**_I'm Behind!_
Fuel America's Sheriff ➔**](http://links.action.supportarpaioforsheriff.com/u/click?_t=c4565dd37122495e8dd51204fa7fda1e&_m=14ef61d11a1c4576b9955c35dead8241&_e=-VI8FXCwGnsiyA6Owxgx9kWSzbVF6mSb3MX3vjqc5vAo2xoO65CkQWs91mek99BbcES8T7TIJMCn7GLJ6nzG6_IyaEwseVZHlhAqpVX52_prPdMDWUtboFWdxD2sJvQnwMf1PZkvvrMan-DwKtAfta500HKSlhUtg9X6Gh5gTr1m8m_H0glXjmmyB971dCp4h4BOLcZxNcoGh8rjyHeMnfB5b0Zp-hxXnZC_suHC9r7e8xrXANLnGk3bL_ACPt-DNDicNiwLZD5Sh034BAvO9Nv8ttg8n-g9sc95B-bJYTIwVl3zm_YD7nrTKRrAS3Ovn7MXHfsJAWudnW2lrc9yuCguvueI52xEIgKpSLMRW_gfmHVyCE85kOsHGKWy3Dx8)
---

I can’t be more clear: **It’s all hands on deck from this moment forward.**

If I miss this goal and can’t make ends meet, we will ALL face the consequences – **_open borders, criminal activity, increased flow of illegal drugs and human traffickers_** – we cannot allow this to happen.

**[Friend, I’m counting on YOU to help me before the end of the year.](http://links.action.supportarpaioforsheriff.com/u/click?_t=c4565dd37122495e8dd51204fa7fda1e&_m=14ef61d11a1c4576b9955c35dead8241&_e=-VI8FXCwGnsiyA6Owxgx9kWSzbVF6mSb3MX3vjqc5vAo2xoO65CkQWs91mek99BbcES8T7TIJMCn7GLJ6nzG6_IyaEwseVZHlhAqpVX52_prPdMDWUtboFWdxD2sJvQnwMf1PZkvvrMan-DwKtAfta500HKSlhUtg9X6Gh5gTr2bKfbfseeIgI4OVPIbIBvsC4DwQXa3Px0lrJ6LLsTAoei9R5y1Lj39IWdOhbQ9ON4lyBqDIG5dpIAjg_HPHhNuTtoPLwO-GsZ-Bvq_NljfZXA0edpRRAK0Neh_072W6-GhwHxo_JtwqP0zISPxlfOwpqD6dX5aKaTrTnL_sTRO5tE3VYP44eDR3eY8qr4Ee2SWswXqep78MvbmexbKFxmT)** Everything is on the line, starting now!

For America,

Sheriff Joe Arpaio

name: Laura, Gavin (2)
subject: FWD: We're suing Donald Trump
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Democratic Governors Association
body:
| |
---
Team, I wanted to make sure you saw Gov. Newsom's email. With Trump and the GOP waging an all-out war on our environment, your immediate response to help us set our strategy could not be more critical.
This round of our climate poll closes in just a few hours, but we still need responses from 37 grassroots Democrats in 34223 before 11:59 p.m. to ensure our results are statistically viable. **Please help us set our climate change strategy today:**
| | **TELL US BEFORE 11:59 P.M.:**
---
**Should Democrats fight climate change?**
---
| | | [YES](http://links.dga.mkt6018.com/ctt?kn=2&ms=MTY3NTE3MTIS1&r=NDgzNzk3NjA4NzczS0&b=0&j=MTc4MTQ3MTQ0MgS2&mt=1&rt=0)
---
| [NO](http://links.dga.mkt6018.com/ctt?kn=3&ms=MTY3NTE3MTIS1&r=NDgzNzk3NjA4NzczS0&b=0&j=MTc4MTQ3MTQ0MgS2&mt=1&rt=0)
---
Thanks for making sure we can plan an effective climate change strategy in 2020.

Laura Carlson
DGA Digital Director

\---------- Forwarded message ---------
From:** Gov. Gavin Newsom** <info@dga.net>
Date: Fri, Dec 06, 2019
Subject: We're suing Donald Trump |
| | |
---
Team -

I'm proud to say California has made serious progress fighting climate change this year.
Unfortunately, at every turn, the Trump administration has attempted to block that progress. They have gutted environmental protections and denied climate science - all to line the pockets of Big Oil.
In his latest attack on the planet, Trump rolled back federal greenhouse gas standards - and even revoked CA's authority to regulate auto emissions. If the president thinks he can stop the states from taking action on climate change, he is dead wrong.
We need to make sure that Democrats can stand up for our environment and curb the effects of climate change - we're even suing Trump to make sure he hears us loud and clear.**But if we 're going to prevent a climate catastrophe, we need to know where our grassroots supporters stand.** The DGA's climate poll is closing at 11:59 p.m. tonight, and we still need your response:
| | **TELL US BEFORE 11:59 P.M.**
---
**Should Democrats fight climate change?**
---
| | | [YES](http://links.dga.mkt6018.com/ctt?kn=7&ms=MTY3NTE3MTIS1&r=NDgzNzk3NjA4NzczS0&b=0&j=MTc4MTQ3MTQ0MgS2&mt=1&rt=0)
---
| [NO](http://links.dga.mkt6018.com/ctt?kn=8&ms=MTY3NTE3MTIS1&r=NDgzNzk3NjA4NzczS0&b=0&j=MTc4MTQ3MTQ0MgS2&mt=1&rt=0)
---
Thanks for pushing back,

Gavin Newsom
Governor of CA
| This email was sent to dpwillis67@gmail.com.
To unsubscribe from the DGA email list, [click here](https://www.pages02.net/democraticgovernorsassoc/unsubscribe/Unsubscribe?spMailingID=16751712&spUserID=NDgzNzk3NjA4NzczS0&spJobID=MTc4MTQ3MTQ0MgS2&spReportId=MTc4MTQ3MTQ0MgS2). | | Paid for by Democratic Governors Association.
---

Peter, we are _almost there._

**We are just 64 -- SIXTY-FOUR -- individual donors away from being a team of 25,000!** That will mean 25,000 people across Texas and beyond have signaled their belief in the values we're fighting for and their commitment to winning this race. That's incredible!

I know we can reach 25,000 before midnight tonight. **[Will you pitch in to our grassroots donor drive so we can share the news with MJ that 25,000 people are fighting alongside her?](https://secure.mjfortexas.com/page/m/6489069c/7f51f7bc/4a1a2ca1/4ef0c764/780363962/VEsC/p/eyJKU1ZOUVVsTVNVNUhTVVFsSlE9PSI6IjY1NSJ9/?g=f7VweDpTVzRduSR3BPpGv5A "https://secure.actblue.com/donate/mj-3drive?refcode=email_20191221.3nd__655__&amount=3&recurring=true")**

No one else in this race has this kind of support. **With nearly 25,000 donors, an average online gift of $21, and 9 out of 10 donations under $100, this campaign is powered by the people through and through** \-- people who are chipping in $3 here and $10 there because they believe in a stronger, more equal Texas.

**That's something we can all be proud of. So Peter, will you chip in $3 or more today to help MJ defeat Sen. Cornyn?**

[We have set a goal of 5,000 new donations before midnight. This may sound like a tall task but if we can get 1 more gift from your zip code before midnight, I won't just meet my goal, I'll make history and officially have hit all the debate donor thresholds set by the DNC before the primaries. >>](https://action.julianforthefuture.com/page/m/709fc952/3eb3e2fc/69eaf615/744ec48a/700366233/VEsH/?g=5-wKdTjfd5lcsCTt4S4B-7A "https://secure.actblue.com/donate/julian-em?refcode=20190707_em_fr_b4_castro_all_rs&recur_weekly=on&recurring=on&amount=25&utm_medium=email&utm_source=juliancastro&utm_content=1+-+We+have+set+a+goal+of+5000+new+donations&utm_campaign=20191221_em_fr_b1_castro_all&source=20191221_em_fr_b1_castro_all") For a kid who grew up on the West Side of San Antonio... | Contributions or gifts to Julian for the Future are not tax deductible.

No one like Julian Castro has ever been in the Oval Office. His grandmother immigrated here from Mexico when she was just 7 years old. She never got past the 4th grade, but she provided for her family by working as a maid and a housekeeper.

Now, her grandson is running for President of the United States. Against all odds, grassroots Democrats like YOU helped him qualify for the Democratic debates and sent him to the front of the pack of Democratic candidates.

We know we send you a lot of emails, but that's because we're relying on grassroots supporters to overcome our next big challenge:

Julian must be able to compete and build a movement that lasts for the long haul, and he's not taking a cent of corporate PAC money to do it. Will you be a part of this historic campaign?

**[DONATE](https://action.julianforthefuture.com/page/m/709fc952/3eb3e2fc/69eaf615/744ec4ff/700366233/VEsHBw/?g=5-wKdTjfd5lcsCTt4S4B-7A "https://secure.actblue.com/donate/julian-em?refcode=email_footer_donate&amount=25&recurring=on&recur_weekly=on&utm_medium=email&utm_source=juliancastro&utm_content=12+-+DONATE&utm_campaign=20191221_em_fr_b1_castro_all&source=20191221_em_fr_b1_castro_all")**
Again, we know we send you a lot of emails. We hope you'll stick with us long-term. If you want to stay updated but receive fewer emails, please let us know [here](https://action.julianforthefuture.com/page/m/709fc952/3eb3e2fc/69eaf615/744ec4fe/700366233/VEsHBg/?g=5-wKdTjfd5lcsCTt4S4B-7A "https://action.julianforthefuture.com/page/s/receive-fewer-emails?utm_medium=email&utm_source=juliancastro&utm_content=13+-+here&utm_campaign=20191221_em_fr_b1_castro_all&source=20191221_em_fr_b1_castro_all"). If you'd like to unsubscribe completely, we understand. Please unsubscribe [here](https://action.julianforthefuture.com/page/m/709fc952/3eb3e2fc/69eaf615/744ec4fd/700366233/VEsHAQ/?g=5-wKdTjfd5lcsCTt4S4B-7A "https://action.julianforthefuture.com/unsubscribe?utm_medium=email&utm_source=juliancastro&utm_content=14+-+here&utm_campaign=20191221_em_fr_b1_castro_all&source=20191221_em_fr_b1_castro_all"), and we'll make sure to process your request.

This message was sent to: dpwillis67@gmail.com.
