name: Erik Polyak, 314ActionFund.org
subject: Senate is in play now
disclaimer_text: Paid for by 314 Action Fund, 314action
body:
|
> I don't like to bother you on a weekend, right before the holidays, but this is important. When impeachment passed the House this week, Republican Senators raced to defend the president's crimes and rig the trial.

It was a stark reminder that we can't afford to let Mitch McConnell stay Senate Majority Leader. Our Constitution relies on us winning our battleground races and flipping the Senate.

These Senators enable the president's corruption, and we need to hold them accountable.

[You can do that by helping us hit our Senate Battleground Fund goal by midnight tonight. Just a $10 donation will help us get there:](https://secure.314action.%3D%3D/?g=v87XQ8Qot1BdKB-_uknky5A "https://secure.actblue.com/donate/314-decfr?amount=10&recurring=auto&firstname=&lastname=&addr1=&addr2=&email=dpwillis67@gmail.com&zip=&city=&state=&phone=&occupation=&employer=&&&utm_medium=email&utm_source=naughton&utm_content=1+-+You+can+do+that+by+helping+us+hit+our+Se&utm_campaign=314_EM_FR_30OP_191221_1_4&source=314_EM_FR_30OP_191221_1_4&refcode=314_EM_FR_30OP_191221_1_4") | If you've stored your payment information with ActBlue Express, your donation will process immediately.

name: TomSteyer.com
subject: 4th debate...and more!
disclaimer_text: PAID FOR BY TOM STEYER 2020]()
body:
| | | |
---
---
Hey there, Your support has helped Tom share his plans for fixing our broken democracy on stage during three Democratic presidential debates — now, we're asking you to help get him to his **fourth debate**. On Friday, the Democratic National Committee released the new criteria for candidates to qualify for the January debate. **We need your help to reach the grassroots donor threshold of 225,000 individual donors. name: Brad Elkins, People for Ben
subject: state of the race [December]
disclaimer_text: Paid for and authorized by People for Ben
body:
An update on Ben Ray Lujan's campaign for U.S. Senate.
|
---
[ ](https://secure.benrlujan.com/page/m/40f6b775/18e32a7f/50bca5b1/7b228dd9/3873937968/VEsH/?g=YeDMcDpTVzRcsCgKwv9UzQ "http://www.benrlujan.com/")

| | **_FROM THE CAMPAIGN MANAGER 'S DESK:_**

Happy almost-2020! With the holiday season upon us and the new year sneaking up, I've been reflecting on the progress of our campaign -- and how much we've accomplished since launching last April.

Over the last eight months, we've:
* Earned thousands of endorsements from hard-working New Mexican voters.
* Recruited hundreds of volunteers to get out the vote and;
* Raised more money than any non-incumbent Senate campaign in New Mexico history at this point in the election cycle -- all while taking no corporate PAC money and building a grassroots network of small-dollar New Mexican donors.

**Those are major accomplishments -- and we couldn't have done it without you.**

The year ahead will be exciting and challenging. To date, three Republicans have announced their campaigns to run against Ben Ray.

The winner of the Republican Senate primary will end up working closely with the Trump campaign. They will be well-funded and heavily staffed -- but _no amount of money can beat the New Mexico grassroots_. If we work together and stay focused, we can keep New Mexico blue.

Right now, our priority is ensuring Ben Ray's place on the ballot. In order to do that, we must collect thousands of signatures from registered New Mexico Democrats.

**We need your help! **If you and your family will be staying in (or visiting) New Mexico over the holidays, there are opportunities to collect signatures and volunteer with our campaign. [Click here](https://secure.benrlujan.com/page/m/40f6b775/18e32a7f/50bca5b1/7b228dde/3873937968/VEsE/?g=YeDMcDpTVzRcsCgKwv9UzQ "https://secure.benrlujan.com/page/s/volunteer-signature-collection") or email DeChellie Gray at [dechellie@benraylujan.com](mailto:dechellie@benraylujan.com)to learn more.

**_POLICY UPDATE_

THERE'S A LOT GOING ON IN WASHINGTON.** While impeachment proceedings continue to consume the majority of public attention, Ben Ray is working on policies that will improve the lives of people across New Mexico. Recently, both the House and the Senate passed the _**Esther Martinez Native American Languages Programs Reauthorization Act**_ , legislation that will provide funding to revitalize and sustain Native American languages. Ben Ray was proud to author this legislation in the House and looks forward to seeing New Mexico's indigenous language programs flourish.

**_FINANCE UPDATE_**

**DEADLINE ALERT!** Today marks 10 days until our last end-of-quarter fundraising deadline of the year. After December 31, this campaign will report our fundraising numbers to the Federal Election Commission.

**Here 's why this deadline matters:** After our fundraising report becomes public in January, Republican researchers will pore over our records, looking for signs that our grassroots strength is wavering. If our campaign looks vulnerable, national Republican groups could start dumping even more money into New Mexico to turn our state red. **That 's why meeting our end-of-quarter goal is critically important.** To help us get a head start on fundraising, [chip in here.](https://secure.benrlujan.com/page/m/40f6b775/18e32a7f/50bca5b1/7b228ddf/3873937968/VEsF/?g=YeDMcDpTVzRcsCgKwv9UzQ "https://secure.numero.ai/contribute/peopleforben?refcode=dd_20191221_em_update&amount=25")

**_ENDORSEMENT UPDATE_**

**KIND WORDS FROM OUR FRIENDS** : This month, our campaign was honored to receive endorsements from Planned Parenthood Action Fund, NARAL Pro-Choice America, the Sierra Club, and J Street PAC. These champions of social justice are leading the way on some of the most important issues of our time, and Ben Ray is looking forward to working closely with them in the Senate. Here's what our endorsers are saying about Ben Ray: | **_" Ben Ray Lujan has ALWAYS fought to protect access to sexual and reproductive health care -- including safe, legal abortion -- and we know he'll keep fighting in the Senate. He has Planned Parenthood Action Fund's support!"_ **
\- Alexis McGill Johnson, acting president and CEO of Planned Parenthood Action Fund
---
**_"NARAL is proud to endorse Congressman Luj an, a staunch advocate for reproductive freedom who for a decade has demonstrated his commitment to fighting for women and families in Congress" _**
\- Ilyse Hogue, President of NARAL Pro-Choice America.
**_"We are thrilled to have an environmental champion like Rep. Luj an to protect New Mexico's air, land, and water and build a clean energy economy to benefit all New Mexico families"_ **
\- Richard Barish, Political Chair, Sierra Club Rio Grande Chapter.
**_" Representative Lujan has a track record of supporting principled diplomacy, fighting for democratic values and promoting peace, justice, and self-determination for both Israelis and Palestinians"_ **
\- Ben Shnider, Vice President of Political Affairs and Strategy, J Street PAC.
These four new endorsers join dozens of state and national leaders who have announced their support for our campaign. Our most important endorsements, however, come from families and individuals living right here in New Mexico. We'd be honored if you would [lend your name to our list of New Mexican endorsers.](https://secure.benrlujan.com/page/m/40f6b775/18e32a7f/50bca5b1/7b228ddc/3873937968/VEsC/?g=YeDMcDpTVzRcsCgKwv9UzQ "https://secure.benrlujan.com/page/s/endorse-ben-ray")

**Help us spread the word about our campaign by using the #PeopleforBen hashtag!** [Click here](https://secure.benrlujan.com/page/m/40f6b775/18e32a7f/50bca5b1/7b228ddd/3873937968/VEsD/?g=YeDMcDpTVzRcsCgKwv9UzQ "https://www.facebook.com/sharer.php?u=https%3A%2F%2Fwww.facebook.com%2FBenRayLujan%2Fphotos%2Fa.399708167831%2F10157181978142832%2F%3Ftype%3D3%26av%3D13063797831%26eav%3DAfb9Um71IeXO3aGCGZvj83G-UHo_pPGEChuDGF8aGWc-y_cDAcltzdk9lXqT6XBmJqQ%26theater") to share a list of our most prominent endorsers on Facebook.

**_FIELD UPDATE_**

**SIGNATURE COLLECTION CONTINUES.** In New Mexico, candidates must collect thousands of nominating signatures to appear on the June primary ballot. Collecting these signatures requires tremendous grassroots mobilization across the state -- and Ben Ray is counting on volunteers to help meet our signature goals! Want to help collect signatures? [Sign up here.](https://secure.benrlujan.com/page/m/40f6b775/18e32a7f/50bca5b1/7b228dde/3873937968/VEsA/?g=YeDMcDpTVzRcsCgKwv9UzQ "https://secure.benrlujan.com/page/s/volunteer-signature-collection")

Can't collect signatures but want to help? [Pitch in to our Volunteer Fund](https://secure.benrlujan.com/page/m/40f6b775/18e32a7f/50bca5b1/7b228dd2/3873937968/VEsB/?g=YeDMcDpTVzRcsCgKwv9UzQ "https://secure.numero.ai/contribute/dd_20191220_em_volunteerfund?refcode=dd_20191221_em_volunteerfund&amount=25") to buy clipboards, pens, and water for our hard-working grassroots teams.

**_POLITICAL UPDATE_**

**ALL POLITICS IS LOCAL**. Over the next few weeks, county nominating conventions will begin across New Mexico. Attending local conventions is a great way to get involved in local politics and talk to members of your community about supporting Ben Ray.

Interested in attending a convention as a supporter of our campaign? [Fill out this form and we'll be in touch.](https://secure.benrlujan.com/page/m/40f6b775/18e32a7f/50bca5b1/7b228dd3/3873937968/VEsO/?g=YeDMcDpTVzRcsCgKwv9UzQ "https://secure.benrlujan.com/page/s/county-conventions")

**_FUN STUFF_**

**PEOPLE FOR BEN** is the online community for our campaign. [Join us](https://secure.benrlujan.com/page/m/40f6b775/18e32a7f/50bca5b1/7b228dd0/3873937968/VEsP/?g=YeDMcDpTVzRcsCgKwv9UzQ "https://www.facebook.com/groups/210720152829696/") to get a behind-the-scenes look at our travels across the state and learn about new ways to get involved.

_**AND ABOVE ALL ...**_

Happy holidays and a joyful new year, from our campaign family to yours!

__****__
__ __
|
---
[](https://secure.benrlujan.com/page/m/40f6b775/18e32a7f/50bca5b1/7b228dd1/3873937968/VEsHBQ/?g=YeDMcDpTVzRcsCgKwv9UzQ "https://www.facebook.com/BenRayLujan") [](https://secure.benrlujan.com/page/m/40f6b775/18e32a7f/50bca5b1/7b228dd6/3873937968/VEsHBA/?g=YeDMcDpTVzRcsCgKwv9UzQ "https://twitter.com/benraylujan") [](https://secure.benrlujan.com/page/m/40f6b775/18e32a7f/50bca5b1/7b228dd7/3873937968/VEsHBw/?g=YeDMcDpTVzRcsCgKwv9UzQ "https://www.instagram.com/benraylujan/?hl=en")
Ben Ray Lujan is running to be the first Hispanic Senator from New Mexico in more than 40 years. No one like Ben Ray has ever run for Senate before. He led the charge to take back the House for the American people and Democrats (and succeeded by a historic margin) and now he's running to take back the Senate too.

We know we send you a lot of emails, but that's because Ben Ray isn't taking a cent of corporate PAC money. His campaign is 100% people-powered. And the polls show we have a once-in-a-lifetime shot to finally defeat Mitch McConnell and take back the Senate. But we can't do this without winning New Mexico. Will you be a part of this historic movement?
**[DONATE](https://secure.benrlujan.com/page/m/40f6b775/18e32a7f/50bca5b1/7b228dd4/3873937968/VEsHBg/?g=YeDMcDpTVzRcsCgKwv9UzQ "https://secure.actblue.com/donate/brl_email?refcode=email_footer_donate&amount=25&recurring=on&recur_weekly=on")**
We're counting on you to stick with us for the long-haul. If you want to stay updated but receive fewer emails, [_**please let us know.**_](https://secure.benrlujan.com/page/m/40f6b775/18e32a7f/50bca5b1/7b228dd5/3873937968/VEsHAQ/?g=YeDMcDpTVzRcsCgKwv9UzQ "https://secure.benrlujan.com/page/s/fewer-emails") If you'd like to unsubscribe completely, we understand. Please unsubscribe [_here_](https://secure.benrlujan.com/page/m/40f6b775/18e32a7f/50bca5b1/7b228dca/3873937968/VEsHAA/?g=YeDMcDpTVzRcsCgKwv9UzQ "https://secure.benrlujan.com/unsubscribe"), and we'll make sure to process your request.

People for Ben
PO Box 25371
Albuquerque, NM 87125

clean_body: An update on Ben Ray Lujan's campaign for U.S. Senate. | "" | | FROM THE CAMPAIGN MANAGER 'S DESK: Happy almost-2020! With the holiday season upon us and the new year sneaking up, I've been reflecting on the progress of our campaign -- and how much we've accomplished since launching last April. Over the last eight months, we've: Earned thousands of endorsements from hard-working New Mexican voters. Recruited hundreds of volunteers to get out the vote and; Raised more money than any non-incumbent Senate campaign in New Mexico history at this point in the election cycle -- all while taking no corporate PAC money and building a grassroots network of small-dollar New Mexican donors. Those are major accomplishments -- and we couldn't have done it without you. The year ahead will be exciting and challenging. To date, three Republicans have announced their campaigns to run against Ben Ray. The winner of the Republican Senate primary will end up working closely with the Trump campaign. They will be well-funded and heavily staffed -- but no amount of money can beat the New Mexico grassroots. If we work together and stay focused, we can keep New Mexico blue. Right now, our priority is ensuring Ben Ray's place on the ballot. In order to do that, we must collect thousands of signatures from registered New Mexico Democrats. We need your help! name: Kathy Manning for North Carolina
subject: This race just got real
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Kathy Manning for Congress
body:
From one challenge to the next ->
|
---

| | This race just got real. Yesterday was the filing deadline, and we reached our $50,000 goal! Unfortunately, there's no time to rest on our laurels. We need to immediately focus on the next challenge: the FEC deadline. [_**This is the first FEC deadline since we launched our campaign and it 's the last one of the year. We only have 10 days to raise $75,000. Will you chip in?**_](https://secure.kathymanningfornc.com/page/m/18d9d3c7/3d199a51/2f3ae368/7364e7d3/2368349086/VEsH/p/eyJKU1ZEVDA1VEpTVT0iOiIxNzQyNiIsImUzdHpiSFZuZlgwPSI6ImttZTE5MTIyMSIsImUzdDJaWEp6YVc5dWZYMD0iOiJtIn0%3D/?g=Bm8FRTjfd5ld5gouxTH21cA "https://secure.actblue.com/contribute/page/kme191221?refcode=kme191221_m_other&refcode2=17426") Now that the filing deadline has come and gone, the stage is set for our race. **We have six opponents: four primary opponents and two Republicans.** Our opponents and special-interest groups will be among the first to look at our numbers after the FEC deadline to judge the viability of our campaign. If we don't reach our goal, they could take it as an opportunity to steamroll us with dark money. [_**So before you head out for the holidays, please chip in to our campaign before the FEC deadline.**_](https://secure.kathymanningfornc.com/page/m/18d9d3c7/3d199a51/2f3ae368/7364e7d3/2368349086/VEsE/p/eyJKU1ZEVDA1VEpTVT0iOiIxNzQyNiIsImUzdHpiSFZuZlgwPSI6ImttZTE5MTIyMSIsImUzdDJaWEp6YVc5dWZYMD0iOiJtIn0%3D/?g=Bm8FRTjfd5ld5gouxTH21cA "https://secure.actblue.com/contribute/page/kme191221?refcode=kme191221_m_other&refcode2=17426") Thanks, Team Kathy | | | [Donate](https://secure.kathymanningfornc.com/page/m/18d9d3c7/3d199a51/2f3ae368/7364e7d3/2368349086/VEsF/p/eyJKU1ZEVDA1VEpTVT0iOiIxNzQyNiIsImUzdHpiSFZuZlgwPSI6ImttZTE5MTIyMSIsImUzdDJaWEp6YVc5dWZYMD0iOiJtIn0%3D/?g=Bm8FRTjfd5ld5gouxTH21cA "https://secure.actblue.com/contribute/page/kme191221?refcode=kme191221_m_other&refcode2=17426")

name: Tim Walz
subject: I couldn't say no
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Tina Smith for Minnesota
body:
Tina Smith is a good friend of mine, which is why when she asked me to reach out to this incredible team today, I couldn't say no.

| [](https://action.tinaforminnesota.%3D/?g=YCjTcDpTVzRarKyUt8_RZpA "https://secure.actblue.com/donate/tsm-em191221-walz?refcode=em191221-walz&recurring=yes&email=dpwillis67@gmail.com&zip=18326&firstname=&lastname=&addr1=&addr2=&city=Cresco&state=PA&phone=&employer=&occupation=&amount=10") Folks --

Tina Smith is a good friend of mine, which is why when she asked me to reach out to this incredible team today, I couldn't say no.

You see, Tina won her special election just last year where she had to start from scratch. But her scrappy team built a winning campaign that brought her across the finish line and gave Minnesotans leadership they deserve.

Now she's up again in 2020, making her the only Senate Democrat running back-to-back like this. And it's a must-win seat if we want to take back the Senate majority. But I won't beat around the bush, this race will be tough.

**Minnesota is a top target for Donald Trump, and he's going to spend as much time as possible stoking division across the state.** He already has staff on the ground working to turn Minnesota red, and we just got word they're going to be adding more staff over the next two weeks.

That's alarming news, and why I'm reaching out today:

**Tina's up against a critical FEC deadline in a few short weeks, and she's counting on this team to chip in and help grow this campaign. Can you give $10 or whatever you can afford to support Tina and stop Trump from flipping Minnesota red?** _If you've saved payment information with ActBlue Express, your donation will go through immediately:_ | | [$10 »](https://action.tinaforminnesota.%3D/?g=YCjTcDpTVzRarKyUt8_RZpA "https://secure.actblue.com/donate/tsm-em191221-walz?refcode=em191221-walz&recurring=yes&email=dpwillis67@gmail.com&zip=18326&firstname=&lastname=&addr1=&addr2=&city=Cresco&state=PA&phone=&employer=&occupation=&express_lane=true&amount=10")
---
| | [$25 »](https://action.tinaforminnesota.%3D/?g=YCjTcDpTVzRarKyUt8_RZpA "https://secure.actblue.com/donate/tsm-em191221-walz?refcode=em191221-walz&recurring=yes&email=dpwillis67@gmail.com&zip=18326&firstname=&lastname=&addr1=&addr2=&city=Cresco&state=PA&phone=&employer=&occupation=&express_lane=true&amount=25")
---
| [$50 »](https://action.tinaforminnesota.%3D/?g=YCjTcDpTVzRarKyUt8_RZpA "https://secure.actblue.com/donate/tsm-em191221-walz?refcode=em191221-walz&recurring=yes&email=dpwillis67@gmail.com&zip=18326&firstname=&lastname=&addr1=&addr2=&city=Cresco&state=PA&phone=&employer=&occupation=&express_lane=true&amount=50")
---
| | [$100 »](https://action.tinaforminnesota.%3D/?g=YCjTcDpTVzRarKyUt8_RZpA "https://secure.actblue.com/donate/tsm-em191221-walz?refcode=em191221-walz&recurring=yes&email=dpwillis67@gmail.com&zip=18326&firstname=&lastname=&addr1=&addr2=&city=Cresco&state=PA&phone=&employer=&occupation=&express_lane=true&amount=100")
---
| [$250 »](https://action.tinaforminnesota.%3D/?g=YCjTcDpTVzRarKyUt8_RZpA "https://secure.actblue.com/donate/tsm-em191221-walz?refcode=em191221-walz&recurring=yes&email=dpwillis67@gmail.com&zip=18326&firstname=&lastname=&addr1=&addr2=&city=Cresco&state=PA&phone=&employer=&occupation=&express_lane=true&amount=250")
---
| | [OTHER »](https://action.tinaforminnesota.%3D/?g=YCjTcDpTVzRarKyUt8_RZpA "https://secure.actblue.com/donate/tsm-em191221-walz?refcode=em191221-walz&recurring=yes&email=dpwillis67@gmail.com&zip=18326&firstname=&lastname=&addr1=&addr2=&city=Cresco&state=PA&phone=&employer=&occupation=")

We must keep Tina's seat blue if Democrats want to have any shot at taking back the Senate next year. That's why I'm helping my friend at such a critical moment.

My hope is that you will join me. Thanks.

-- Tim

Tim Walz
Governor of Minnesota

This email was sent to [dpwillis67@gmail.com]().
